poem: 天门一挂榜，预定夺标人，马嘶芳草地，秋高听鹿鸣。
explain: 大吉，事业、财运、健康、婚姻均顺遂。
poem_en: The Heavenly Gate posts the list, destined to win the prize. Horses neigh in the fragrant grass, deer call in the high autumn.
explain_en: Great luck. Career, wealth, health, and marriage are all smooth.

poem: 地有神，甚威灵，兴邦辅国，尊主庇民。
explain: 神护签，言行循规蹈矩，事业上必有贵人相助，婚姻得人，健康亦佳
poem_en: The Earth has spirits, very powerful and majestic. Revitalizing the nation, assisting the country, honoring the lord, protecting the people.
explain_en: Divine protection lot. Follow the rules. You will have noble help in your career. Good marriage and health.

poem: 长安花不可及，春风中马蹄疾，急早加鞭，骤然生色。
explain: 惕励不可好高骛远，目前情况不理想。
poem_en: The flowers of Chang'an are unreachable, the horse hooves are fast in the spring breeze. Whip early, suddenly colorful.
explain_en: Be vigilant, do not aim too high. Current situation is not ideal.

poem: 春花娇媚，不禁雨打风飘，秋菊幽芳，反耐霜 雪傲。
explain: 勉惕类，诸事无法顺利，踏实或有可望。
poem_en: Spring flowers are charming, but cannot withstand rain and wind. Autumn chrysanthemums are fragrant, standing proud against frost and snow.
explain_en: A lot of caution. Things are not going smoothly. Be down-to-earth and there may be hope.

poem: 春雷震，夏风巽，卧龙起，猛虎惊，风云会合，救济苍生。
explain: 否极泰来，外旱逢甘雨，不过婚姻恐有波澜，出外旅游亦不宜。
poem_en: Spring thunder shakes, summer wind blows. The sleeping dragon rises, the fierce tiger is startled. Wind and clouds meet, saving the people.
explain_en: Misfortune turns to fortune. Rain after a drought. But marriage may have waves. Travel is not suitable.

poem: 非玄非奥，非浅非深，一个妙道，着意搜寻。
explain: 心性勿*切，着意搜寻，必能如愿。
poem_en: Not mysterious nor profound, not shallow nor deep. A wonderful path, search with intention.
explain_en: Do not be impatient. Search with intention, and you will get what you want.

poem: 君须悟，勿误疑，有平路，任驱驰，随时变易，件件咸宜。
explain: 应机警应变，始能左右逢源。
poem_en: You must realize, do not doubt. There is a flat road, ride as you please. Change with the times, everything is suitable.
explain_en: Be alert and adaptable, then you can handle everything smoothly.

poem: 虎恋高山别有机，众人目下尚狐疑，雁来嘹呖黄花发，此际声名达帝畿。
explain: 目前无人能识，日後必受众人赞颂，怀才不遇者得此签，日後必发达。
poem_en: The tiger loves the high mountain with a hidden motive, people are still suspicious. The wild geese call, yellow flowers bloom. At this time fame reaches the capital.
explain_en: No one recognizes you now, but you will be praised later. Those with talent but no opportunity will succeed later.

poem: 贵客相逢更可期，庭前枯木凤来仪，好将短事求长事，休听旁人说是非。
explain: 命中得遇贵人相助，未婚男子可得佳侣，商人则应有主见，始能获利。
poem_en: Noble guests meet as expected. The phoenix comes to the withered tree in the courtyard. Seek long-term goals, ignore gossip.
explain_en: You will meet noble helpers. Unmarried men will find good partners. Businessmen should have their own opinions to make profits.

poem: 嘹呖征鸿独出群，高飞羽翼更纠纷，云程北进好音遂闻，朝云暮雨交加有凭。
explain: 才气出众，无奈受制，去向宜北，可获佳遇。
poem_en: The lone wild goose stands out from the flock, flying high with tangled wings. Progress north, good news is heard. Morning clouds and evening rain mixed together.
explain_en: Outstanding talent but restricted. Going North is good. You will have good encounters.

poem: 无踪又无迹，远近均难觅，平地起风波，似笑还成泣。
explain: 诸事不利。
poem_en: No trace, no track, hard to find far or near. Wind and waves rise on flat ground, smiles turn to tears.
explain_en: Everything is unfavorable.

poem: 神黯黯，意悠悠，收却线，莫下钩。
explain: 诸事暂且打住，免有失误，後悔莫及。
poem_en: Spirit is gloomy, mind is leisurely. Put away the line, do not lower the hook.
explain_en: Pause everything for now to avoid mistakes and regret.

poem: 得意宜逢妇，前程去有缘，利名终有望，三五月团圆。
explain: 吉，留意三、五有关月日，或有殊遇、喜事。
poem_en: Proud when meeting a woman, destiny has a connection. Fame and profit are hopeful, reunion in three to five months.
explain_en: Auspicous. Pay attention to months/days with 3 or 5. Good luck or happy events.

poem: 鼎沸起风波，孤舟要渡河，巧中却藏拙，人事转蹉跎。
explain: 不吉，须防树大招风，问婚姻或家人相处者，并争纷颇烈。
poem_en: Wind and waves rise in the boiling cauldron, a lone boat wants to cross the river. Clumsiness hidden in skill, human affairs turn to waste.
explain_en: Inauspicious. Beware of attracting too much attention. Arguments in marriage or family.

poem: 意在闲中信未来，故人千里自徘徊，天边雁足传消息，一点梅花春色回。
explain: 一切期待，均有可得，但须再等待一段时间。
poem_en: Intention is in leisure, news has not come. Old friends wander a thousand miles away. The goose foot brings news, a plum blossom brings back spring.
explain_en: Expectations will be met, but you must wait a while.

poem: 心和同，事知同，门外好施功，交加事有终。
explain: 得此签者，不合者必复合。
poem_en: Hearts are in harmony, things are known together. Good deeds outside the door, interactions have an end.
explain_en: Those who are separated will reunite.

poem: 欲行还止，徘徊不已，藏玉怀珠，寸心千里。
explain: 处於蓄势欲发又迟疑难决者，宜下定决心，完成大业。
poem_en: Want to go but stop, wandering endlessly. Hiding jade and carrying pearls, a heart a thousand miles away.
explain_en: Hesitating but ready to go. Make up your mind to achieve great things.

poem: 心戚戚，口啾啾，一番思虑一番忧，说了休时又不休。
explain: 不利，结局恐难有望。
poem_en: Heart is sad, mouth is chattering. One thought, one worry. Said to stop but never stops.
explain_en: Unfavorable. Outcome is unlikely to be hopeful.

poem: 不远不近，似易似难，等闲一事，云中笑看。
explain: 平平，成败利钝淡然处之。
poem_en: Not far not near, seems easy seems hard. An ordinary matter, watching from the clouds with a smile.
explain_en: Average. Treat success and failure lightly.

poem: 桃李谢春风，西飞又复东，家中无意绪，船在浪涛中。
explain: 栽种不得其时，去向漂流不定，远行旅程不顺，家庭亦有风波。
poem_en: Peach and plum wither in spring wind, flying west then east. No mood at home, boat in the waves.
explain_en: Planting at the wrong time. Drifting direction. Travel is not smooth. Family has waves.

poem: 一水远一水，一山旋一山，水穷山尽处，名利不为难。
explain: 须费尽九牛二虎之力始克有成。
poem_en: One water further than another, one mountain after another. Where water ends and mountains end, fame and profit are not difficult.
explain_en: Success comes after great effort.

poem: 事相扶，在半途，翻覆终可免，风波一点无。
explain: 目前不顺，惟亦不致有风险。
poem_en: Things support each other, halfway through. Overturning can be avoided, no wind and waves.
explain_en: Currently not smooth, but no risk.

poem: 喜喜喜，春风生桃李，不用强忧煎，明月人千里。
explain: 喜讯已到，故人安然无恙，健康痊愈在即，婚姻可期。
poem_en: Joy, joy, joy. Spring wind gives birth to peach and plum. No need to worry, the moon shines on people a thousand miles away.
explain_en: Good news arrives. Old friends are safe. Health recovers. Marriage is expected.

poem: 意孜孜，心戚戚，要平安，防出入。
explain: 谨言慎行，始得平安。
poem_en: Diligent in mind, sad in heart. To be safe, watch your coming and going.
explain_en: Be cautious in words and deeds to be safe.

poem: 见不见，也防人背面，遇不遇，到底无凭据。
explain: 应防来自西方之暗箭，所问之事尚无徵候。
poem_en: See or not see, beware of people behind your back. Meet or not meet, no proof in the end.
explain_en: Beware of backstabbing from the West. No sign of what you asked.

poem: 一番桃李一番春，谁识当初气象新，林下水边寻活计，见山了了称心意。
explain: 或可任新职，经营事业以农林渔牧为宜，患病者宜换医生并到山水处静养。
poem_en: A season of peach and plum, a season of spring. Who knew the weather was new at first. Seeking livelihood by the water and forest, seeing the mountains pleases the heart.
explain_en: New job is possible. Agriculture/forestry/fishing is good. Sick should change doctor and rest in nature.

poem: 莫怪我见错，心性自成疴，偏僻不通心，真人却不魔。
explain: 不可固执己见，心性偏执者，宜修养心性。
poem_en: Do not blame my wrong view, nature becomes a disease. Biased and unreasonable, a real person is not a demon.
explain_en: Do not be stubborn. Cultivate your character.

poem: 禄马交驰，男儿得志时，行程早办，荣归乐期颐。
explain: 吉祥，若卜仕途宦海之事，尤称合适。
poem_en: Wealth and horses intersect, time for a man to succeed. Prepare for the journey early, return with glory and joy.
explain_en: Auspicous. Especially suitable for official career.

poem: 了却心头事，三生夙有缘，香开十里桂，移步入天边。
explain: 大吉大利，尤对男女姻缘，桂香之时，约为秋季为宜。
poem_en: Settled the matter in the heart, fate from three lives. Fragrance of cassia for ten miles, stepping into the sky.
explain_en: Great luck. Especially for marriage. Autumn (Cassia season) is suitable.

poem: 缘黄阁白了头，毕竟成何济，不如趁此精神，犹好买些真气。
explain: 攀权附贵者宜回头，顶天立地重新做人，否则不得善终。
poem_en: Climbing high and turning white-headed, what is the use in the end? Better to take this spirit, and buy some genuine energy.
explain_en: Those seeking power should turn back. Be an upright person. Otherwise, it won't end well.

poem: 离别间，虽不易，同伴行，犹不滞，早早起程，免他失意。
explain: 平平，创业须结伴。
poem_en: Parting is not easy. Walking together, no delay. Start the journey early, avoid disappointment.
explain_en: Average. Start business with a partner.

poem: 乐之极忧将至，巽兑分明吉与凶，未能光大终幽暗，日落西山返照中。
explain: 不祥。
poem_en: Extreme joy brings sorrow. Xun and Dui clearly show good and bad. Cannot shine in the end, gloomy. Sunset on the western hill reflects.
explain_en: Ominous.

poem: 历过波涛三五重，谁知浪静又无风，须教明达青云路，用舍行藏不费功。
explain: 平平。
poem_en: Experienced three or five waves, who knows it is calm and windless. Must teach the bright road to blue clouds, action and inaction require no effort.
explain_en: Average.

poem: 缺月又重圆，枯枝色更鲜，一条夷坦路，翘首望青天。
explain: 吉昌
poem_en: Missing moon is full again, withered branch is fresh again. A flat road, looking up at the blue sky.
explain_en: Auspicous.

poem: 行路难行路难，今日方知行路难，前程广大何足虑，琼力今朝度此滩。
explain: 一向平顺，今突生险，惟必可过关。
poem_en: Hard to travel, hard to travel. Today I know it is hard to travel. Why worry about the vast future, use strength to cross this beach today.
explain_en: Always smooth, suddenly dangerous. But you will pass.

poem: 春景明，春色新，春意傍水生，春天无限好，好去宴琼林。
explain: 事业发达，健康良好，性情豁达，交游广阔。
poem_en: Spring scenery is bright, spring color is new. Spring meaning grows by the water. Spring is infinitely good, go to the banquet.
explain_en: Career developed. Health good. Open-minded. Wide social circle.

poem: 万马归元，千猿朝洞，虎伏龙降，道高德重。
explain: 须以德化人。
poem_en: Ten thousand horses return to the origin, a thousand apes bow to the cave. Tigers submit and dragons surrender, high Dao and heavy virtue.
explain_en: Influence people with virtue.

poem: 黄鹂报上林，春色鲜明，提鞭快着，马上速行程。
explain: 做任何事，目前时机最佳。
poem_en: Yellow oriole reports in the forest, spring colors are bright. Raise the whip quickly, speed up the journey.
explain_en: Best time to do anything right now.

poem: 大肆放灵丹，救人行万千，到头登彼岸，渡过入仙班。
explain: 行善济人，必得善果，医生得此签，必为名医，教师得此签，必为名师。
poem_en: Freely give panacea, save thousands of people. Reach the other shore in the end, join the immortals.
explain_en: Do good deeds. Doctors will be famous, teachers will be famous.

poem: 一带水，碧澄澄，舟住江上，月到天心；稳步其中，玄妙不闲，非人误己，几丧生身。
explain: 塞翁失马，焉知非福，诸事均欠顺遂，惟尚未铸下大错，还能全身而退。
poem_en: A belt of water, clear and blue. Boat stays on the river, moon in the sky center. Steady steps in it, mysterious and not idle. Wrong person harms self, almost lost life.
explain_en: Blessing in disguise. Things are not smooth, but no big mistake yet. Can retreat safely.

poem: 桃李舒姘，春光鲜丽，良辰美景君须记，随心所往事事相宜，无用多疑干渎神祗。
explain: 吉祥，命中注定事事顺利，多疑而缺乏自信，将辜负上天恩宠。
poem_en: Peach and plum bloom, spring light is fresh. Remember the beautiful day. Follow your heart, everything is suitable. No need to doubt and disturb the gods.
explain_en: Auspicous. Everything is destined to be smooth. Doubt will waste God's favor.

poem: 隐中显，显中微，个中有玄机，参得透了，直上仙梯。
explain: 所问之事呈胶着状态，仅凭蛛丝马迹研判，是否突破就看能否参透玄机。
poem_en: Hidden in the obvious, subtle in the obvious. There is a mystery in it. If you see through it, go straight to the celestial ladder.
explain_en: Situation is stuck. Depends on if you can see the mystery from clues.

poem: 无上去，在前头，回头一悟，绳缰好收，千条万线路常在，自好搜求。
explain: 所问之事可能走错方向，即改弦易辙，另觅可行之路。
poem_en: No way up, in the front. Turn back and realize, gather the reins. Thousands of roads are always there, search for yourself.
explain_en: Wrong direction. Change course and find a feasible path.

poem: 四顾无门路，桃源路可通，修炼成正果，万岁寿如松。
explain: 平平，一生行运不通，惟尚有一线之路，只要多磨练、苦修，日後自成。
poem_en: Looking around, no way. The path to Peach Blossom Source is open. Cultivate to the right result, long life like a pine.
explain_en: Average. Luck is blocked, but there is a ray of hope. Hard work will lead to success.

poem: 不用忙，不用慌，自有驻足乡，鸣鼓响钟地，三宝见门墙。
explain: 做事沈着稳定，自有容身之地，多热心公益，门庭自逢佳运。
poem_en: No need to be busy, no need to panic. There is a place to stop. Place of drums and bells, see the gate of the Three Treasures.
explain_en: Be calm, there is a place for you. Do charity, good luck will come.

poem: 奔波一世，总是虚浮，无常一到万事休，急早回头。
explain: 一生争名夺利，最後化为乌有，回头是岸。
poem_en: Running around all life, always empty. When impermanence comes, everything stops. Turn back early.
explain_en: Fighting for fame and profit ends in nothing. Turn back to the shore.

poem: 真真真，人不识，真真真，神有灵，归宗返本，方是元精。
explain: 诸事假象蒙蔽，误入歧途，认清真象，转入正途。
poem_en: True, true, true, people do not know. True, true, true, gods are effective. Return to the origin, that is the essence.
explain_en: Blinded by false appearances, went astray. Recognize the truth, return to the right path.

poem: 走尽天涯，风霜历遍，不如问人三天，渐渐有回首见。
explain: 冒目躁进必白费功夫，应就教贤达。
poem_en: Walked to the end of the world, experienced wind and frost. Better to ask someone for three days, gradually look back.
explain_en: Rash progress wastes effort. Ask the wise.

poem: 沈沈疴染，不见天心，雷门一震，体健身轻。
explain: 久病者突逢良医，立即恢复健康，经营事业不佳者，可望获良才，兴隆有望。
poem_en: Deep sickness, cannot see the sky. Thunder shakes, body becomes healthy and light.
explain_en: Long illness will meet a good doctor. Business will find good talent.

poem: 财马两匆忙，官禄有定方，猪羊牛犬，自去主张。
explain: 顺其自然。
poem_en: Wealth and horses are busy, official salary has a fixed place. Pig, sheep, cow, dog, go and decide for themselves.
explain_en: Let nature take its course.

poem: 空空空，空里得成功，蟠桃千载熟，不怕五更风。
explain: 大器晚成，若问财运，得此签不祥，若问诉讼，则於缠讼多日可获胜诉。
poem_en: Empty, empty, empty, success in emptiness. Peach ripens in a thousand years, not afraid of the fifth watch wind.
explain_en: Late success. Unlucky for wealth. Good for winning lawsuits after delay.

poem: 愁脸放，笑颜开，秋月挂高台，人从千里来。
explain: 吉祥，心境渐渐开朗，环境已转佳境，寻人定然相遇，其他亦有转机。
poem_en: Frowns released, smiles open. Autumn moon hangs on the high tower, people come from a thousand miles.
explain_en: Auspicous. Mood improves. Environment gets better. Reunion expected.

poem: 须着力，莫远游，长竿钓向蟾蜍窟，直欲云中得巨鳌。
explain: 惕之签，凡事须全力以赴，不可贪玩疏忽，时运来临，愿望自然可成。
poem_en: Must exert effort, do not travel far. Long pole fishes in the toad cave, straight to the clouds to get the giant turtle.
explain_en: Caution. Go all out. Don't play around. Wishes will come true when luck comes.

poem: 无踪无迹，远近难觅，旱海行舟，空劳费力。
explain: 诸事难成。
poem_en: No trace, no track, hard to find far or near. Boat in a dry sea, wasted effort.
explain_en: Hard to succeed.

poem: 细雨蒙蒙湿，江边路不通，道途音信远，凭仗借东风。
explain: 时运欠佳，一切难望有成，惟有依靠仅有之一线生机。
poem_en: Fine rain is misty and wet, the road by the river is blocked. News is far away, rely on the east wind.
explain_en: Bad luck. Hard to achieve anything. Rely on the only ray of hope.

poem: 平地起云烟，时下未能安，高处觅姻缘。
explain: 所问之事现时现地均难有成，如问姻缘，须向显赫人家去求，如问事业，波折重重。
poem_en: Smoke rises on flat ground, currently unstable. Seek marriage in high places.
explain_en: Nothing can be achieved here and now. Seek marriage from prominent families. Career has twists.

poem: 正直宜守，妄动生灾，利通名达，叶落花开。
explain: 应坚守本位，正直无欺。
poem_en: Uprightness should be kept, rash action brings disaster. Profit and fame achieved, leaves fall and flowers bloom.
explain_en: Stick to your position. Be upright.

poem: 君子升，小人阻，征战生离苦，前有吉人逢，信在马牛人在楚，事要营求妥。
explain: 所问之事波折连连，有人玉成，有人破坏，无地利之便，须稳妥安排为宜。
poem_en: Gentleman rises, villain blocks. Suffering from war and separation. Meet a good person in front. Letter on horse/cow, person in Chu. Plan carefully.
explain_en: Twists and turns. Help and destruction coexist. No geographical advantage. Plan carefully.

poem: 纷纷复纷纷，欷 独掩门， 眉望灯火，伴我坐黄昏。
explain: 须守时耐运，待机而行，不可强求。妇人求得此签，恐有夫妻失和情事。
poem_en: Disordered and messy, sobbing alone behind the door. Looking at the lamp, sitting with me at dusk.
explain_en: Wait for the right time. Don't force it. Wife may have discord.

poem: 红颜美，休挂怀，人在车中，舟行水里。
explain: 戒之在色，凡事不可存奢望。
poem_en: Red face is beautiful, do not worry. Person in the cart, boat in the water.
explain_en: Beware of lust. Do not have extravagant hopes.

poem: 桥已断，路不通，登舟理楫，又遇狂风。
explain: 大不吉，凡事宜慎。
poem_en: Bridge is broken, road blocked. Board the boat and row, encounter wild wind again.
explain_en: Very ominous. Be careful in everything.

poem: 深潭月，照镜影，一场空，安报信。
explain: 水底月，镜中花，花蓝打水一场空。
poem_en: Moon in deep pool, image in mirror. All in vain, waiting for news.
explain_en: Moon in water, flower in mirror. All effort in vain.

poem: 湖海意悠悠，烟波下钓钩，若逢龙与兔，名利一齐周。
explain: 示人胸襟以阔，达观为怀，自可名利双收。(注意龙兔年或属龙兔之人)
poem_en: Lake and sea meaning is leisurely, fishing hook in the misty waves. If dragon and rabbit are met, fame and profit are complete.
explain_en: Be broad-minded. Fame and profit will come. (Note Dragon/Rabbit years or people).

poem: 物不牢，人断桥，重整理，慢心高。
explain: 所问之事应重新来过，如以笃实之态度为之，或有可成。
poem_en: Things are not firm, people break the bridge. Reorganize, slow down the high heart.
explain_en: Start over. Be practical, maybe success.

poem: 入而易，出而难，恹恹到再三，交加意不堪。
explain: 请神容易送神难。
poem_en: Easy to enter, hard to exit. Languid again and again. Mixed feelings are unbearable.
explain_en: Easy to invite a god, hard to send him away.

poem: 事迟志速，而且反覆，直待岁寒，花残果熟。
explain: 若时机未熟，但凭己力，尚难成就。妇女得此签，显示心意不足，青春蹉跎。
poem_en: Events delay, will is fast, and repetitive. Wait until winter, flowers fade and fruits ripen.
explain_en: Time is not ripe. Hard to succeed by yourself. Women waste youth.

poem: 乘马前进，所求吉贞，随时谐美，缺月重明。
explain: 一鼓作气，勇往直前，即使往昔曾犯缺失，如今亦可重获振作之机。
poem_en: Ride a horse forward, what you seek is auspicious. Harmonious at any time, missing moon brightens again.
explain_en: Go forward bravely. Even if there were mistakes, you can revitalize.

poem: 舟离古渡月离云，人出潼关好问津，且向前行去求住，何须疑虑两三心。
explain: 此签主外，出远行有利，得此签者，所问之事难题已解，难关已破，从此坦途。
poem_en: Boat leaves the old ferry, moon leaves the clouds. People leave Tongguan to ask for the way. Just go forward to seek residence, why hesitate.
explain_en: Good for travel/outside. Difficulties solved. Smooth path ahead.

poem: 不足不足，难伸心曲，野塘雨过月如钩，梦断邯郸眉黛愁。
explain: 知足常乐，随遇而安，否则梦境难圆之慨，妇女得此签，宜勉力抛虚荣之心。
poem_en: Insufficient, insufficient, hard to express heart's song. Rain passes over wild pond, moon like a hook. Dream broken in Handan, eyebrows frowning.
explain_en: Be content. Adapt. Otherwise dreams won't come true. Women should abandon vanity.

poem: 美有堪，堪有美，始有终，终有始。
explain: 为人追求真善美方为正途，凡事必以始终一贯精神为之。
poem_en: Beauty has worth, worth has beauty. Beginning has end, end has beginning.
explain_en: Pursue truth, goodness, and beauty. Be consistent.

poem: 湖海悠悠，孤舟浪头，来人未渡，残照山楼。
explain: 所问诸事尚在虚无飘渺间，当前处境未开，心绪至为郁闷，情境苍茫。
poem_en: Lakes and seas are vast, lone boat on the waves. The person has not crossed, setting sun on the mountain tower.
explain_en: Things are vague. Situation not open. Depressed mood.

poem: 深户要牢扃，提防暗里人，莫言无外事，纵好定遭 。
explain: 无事须当有事，有事更加防范，得此签者须注意门户以防窃，谨言慎行免招祸。
poem_en: Deep doors must be locked, beware of people in the dark. Do not say there are no outside matters, even good things encounter disasters.
explain_en: Be careful even if nothing happens. Guard against theft. Be cautious in speech.

poem: 江海悠悠，烟波下钩，六鳌连获，歌笑中流。
explain: 此签大吉，凡谋事、创业必有望，且连获成功，尤其逢「六」数，更具喜色也。
poem_en: River and sea are vast, hook in the misty waves. Six turtles caught in a row, singing and laughing in midstream.
explain_en: Great luck. Business/Entrepreneurship hopeful. Success in a row. Number 6 is lucky.

poem: 欲济未济，欲求强求，心无一定，一车两头。
explain: 三心二意，有违常理，动弹不得，得此签者，所问诸事均呈胶着状态。
poem_en: Want to cross but not crossed, want to force but forced. Heart is uncertain, one cart two heads.
explain_en: Indecisive. Against logic. Stuck. Things are in a stalemate.

poem: 一得一虑，退後欲先，路通大道，心自安然。
explain: 得意之时勿忘形，失败之後勿失志，不行歪路，心境自然安适。
poem_en: One gain one worry, retreat to advance. Road leads to the main way, heart is naturally at peace.
explain_en: Don't be arrogant in success, don't be discouraged in failure. Stay on right path.

poem: 难难难，忽然平地起波澜，易易易，谈笑寻常终有望。
explain: 机遇欠佳时，人在家中坐，祸从天上来，行运转佳时，一切左右逢源，得心应手。
poem_en: Hard, hard, hard, suddenly waves rise on flat ground. Easy, easy, easy, talking and laughing, finally there is hope.
explain_en: Bad luck: disaster from sky. Good luck: everything handy.

poem: 心有馀，力不足，倚仗春风，一歌一曲。
explain: 所问之事，自己心馀力绌，无法独力完成，但会有外力来助，结果仍称圆满。
poem_en: Heart has excess, strength is insufficient. Rely on spring breeze, one song one tune.
explain_en: Cannot do it alone. External help will come. Result is satisfactory.

poem: 身不安，心不安，动静两三番，终朝事必叹。
explain: 问健康，应多运动，问事业，则现危机，需多所奔走，问婚姻，处倦怠状，需努力。
poem_en: Body uneasy, heart uneasy. Movement and stillness two or three times. Sighing all morning.
explain_en: Health: exercise. Career: crisis. Marriage: weary. Need effort.

poem: 事了物未了，人圆物未圆，要知端的信，日影上琅 。
explain: 人、事问题，均了断并圆满解决，有关物则否，得此签，恐有财务纠纷并涉讼。
poem_en: Matter finished, object not finished. People round, object not round. To know the true news, sun shadow on the jade.
explain_en: People/Matters resolved. Material things not. Financial disputes or lawsuits likely.

poem: 木向阳春发，三阴又伏根，樵夫不知道，砍去作柴薪。
explain: 不可暴殄天物，对事物体认不够，任意扔弃滥用，岂不可惜。
poem_en: Wood grows towards spring sun, three shades cover the root. Woodcutter does not know, cuts it for firewood.
explain_en: Do not waste things. Misunderstanding the value and discarding it is a pity.

poem: 一月缺，一镜缺，不团圆，无可说。
explain: 此签不吉，月既缺镜又损，所问诸事自属不圆满，恐亦无转机。
poem_en: One moon missing, one mirror missing. Not reunited, nothing to say.
explain_en: Inauspicious. Incomplete. No turning point.

poem: 车马到临，旌旗隐隐月分明，招安讨叛，永大前程。
explain: 此签如问战略戎事大吉，问事业则大发，问考试则高中。
poem_en: Chariots and horses arrive, flags hidden, moon is clear. Pacify and punish rebels, eternal future.
explain_en: Military: Great luck. Business: Great success. Exam: High pass.

poem: 我何宿，我何宿，海东河北成名录，一段神光，直冲天渎。
explain: 选择努力方向，如能吸取前贤经验，必能事半功倍，如得神助。
poem_en: Where do I stay? Where do I stay? Fame recorded in Haidong and Hebei. A ray of divine light, straight to heaven.
explain_en: Choose direction. Learn from predecessors. Like divine help.

poem: 金鳞入手，得还防走，若论周旋，谨言缄口。
explain: 金鳞影射钱财，警惕吾人谨言少语，如遇友人金钱周转，须防上当受骗。
poem_en: Gold scales in hand, guard against leaving. If discussing socializing, keep mouth shut.
explain_en: Gold scales = Money. Be silent. Beware of being cheated by friends borrowing money.

poem: 倾一 ，展愁眉，天地合，好思为。
explain: 愁闷事在杯酒中尽释，夫妻间之不合应尽快化解。
poem_en: Tilt a cup, spread frowning eyebrows. Heaven and earth join, good to think and do.
explain_en: Sorrows dissolved in wine. Husband and wife discord should be resolved quickly.

poem: 野鬼张弧射主人，暗中一箭鬼魂惊，忽然红日沈江海，难破空中事不明。
explain: 得此签者如为主管，恐有欺害下属之事，结果遭到致命之报复。
poem_en: Wild ghost draws bow to shoot master, secret arrow scares the soul. Suddenly red sun sinks in river and sea, hard to break the mystery in the air.
explain_en: If a leader, beware of bullying subordinates, resulting in fatal revenge.

poem: 福星照，吉宿临，青天有日见天真，龙飞下载到明庭。
explain: 此签吉利，全属福佑德庇之赞。
poem_en: Lucky star shines, auspicious star arrives. Blue sky has sun, seeing innocence. Dragon flies down to the bright court.
explain_en: Auspicious. Blessed by virtue.

poem: 独钓寒潭，中途兴阑，水寒鱼不饵，空载月明还。
explain: 不祥，所处环境欠佳，所求未如理想，反生阻碍。
poem_en: Fishing alone in cold pool, interest fades halfway. Water cold fish don't bite, return with only moonlight.
explain_en: Ominous. Bad environment. Wishes not met. Obstacles.

poem: 不归一，劳心力，贵人旁，宜借力。
explain: 所问诸事意见纷陈，头绪杂乱，如不借助有力者，恐要白费心力。
poem_en: Not unified, laboring mind and strength. Noble person nearby, should borrow strength.
explain_en: Opinions divided. Messy. Must borrow strength from powerful people.

poem: 云尽月当中，光辉到处通，路途逢水顺，千里快如风。
explain: 转机交运之兆，时下机运甚佳，所问大吉大利。
poem_en: Clouds gone, moon in the center. Brilliance everywhere. Road meets smooth water, thousand miles fast as wind.
explain_en: Turning point. Good luck. Everything auspicious.

poem: 剑戟列山林，盗贼必来侵，败走擒搜定，封侯荫子孙。
explain: 激烈竞争中，需料敌如神，妥为布置以待敌来，赢得胜利後尚需妥善收拾战果。
poem_en: Swords and halberds in the forest, thieves will invade. Defeated and captured, nobility for descendants.
explain_en: Fierce competition. Anticipate enemy. Win and manage results well.

poem: 岸阔水深舟易落，路遥山险步难行，蛇行自有通津日，月上天空分外明。
explain: 所问诸事宜向宽处打算，向远途作想，最後必能成功。
poem_en: Bank wide water deep boat easily falls. Road far mountain dangerous hard to walk. Snake travel has a day of passage, moon in sky exceptionally bright.
explain_en: Plan broadly. Think long term. Success in the end.

poem: 拟欲迁而未可迁，提防喜处惹勾连，前途若得阴人引，变化鱼龙出大渊。
explain: 勿为喜事冲昏头，谨防欢乐引出麻烦。
poem_en: Intend to move but cannot move yet, beware of trouble in happy places. If guided by a woman/hidden person, change from fish to dragon out of the abyss.
explain_en: Don't get dizzy with joy. Beware of trouble in happiness.

poem: 一人去，一人入，清风明月两相猜，获得金鳞下钓台。
explain: 二人合作成功前互疑，惟风度尚在，问婚姻状况，求嗣不得而猜疑，後喜获一女而解。
poem_en: One person goes, one person enters. Breeze and bright moon guess each other. Get gold scales off the fishing platform.
explain_en: Suspicion before cooperation success. Manners remain. Marriage: worry about no heir, then get a daughter.

poem: 喜未稳，悲已遭，大雨狂风吹古木，人人尽道不坚牢。
explain: 世间悲欢无常，且悲事往往比喜事严重，常能将人击倒。
poem_en: Joy not steady, sorrow already encountered. Heavy rain and wild wind blow old trees, everyone says it's not firm.
explain_en: Joy and sorrow are impermanent. Sorrow is often severe.

poem: 可以寄百里之命，可以托六尺之孤，锺期既遇毋迟误。笑呼呼，他乡聚首，各自乐康和。
explain: 得此签者，可望遇知音，交至友，得生死相许之配偶。
poem_en: Can entrust life of a hundred miles, can entrust an orphan of six feet. Meeting Zhong Qi, do not delay. Laughing, gathering in foreign land, everyone happy and healthy.
explain_en: Meet a soulmate. Best friend. Life partner.

poem: 报道上林，春色鲜明，提鞭快着，马上行程。
explain: 亨通顺利，时运好转。
poem_en: Report to Shanglin, spring colors are bright. Raise whip quickly, start journey on horse.
explain_en: Prosperous and smooth. Luck turns good.

poem: 鼠入土穴，最可安身，日中不见，静夜巡行。
explain: 人各有其不同安身立命之所及最适当行动时机，选择其他恐大不利。
poem_en: Rat enters earthen hole, safest place. Not seen in the day, patrolling in quiet night.
explain_en: Everyone has their place and time. Choosing otherwise is unfavorable.

poem: 打起平生志，西南好去游，腰缠十万贯，骑鹤上扬州。
explain: 得此签者，已功成名就，或者，目前从事者志趣不合，如今财力已丰，可以从已趣。
poem_en: Strike up lifelong ambition, go to Southwest to travel. Waist wrapped with ten thousand strings of cash, ride a crane to Yangzhou.
explain_en: Achieved fame and success. Or, change career to what you like if wealthy.

poem: 喜喜喜，终防否，获得骊龙颔下珠，忽然失却，还在水里。
explain: 谨防有乐极生悲之事发生。
poem_en: Joy, joy, joy, finally guard against denial. Get the pearl under the dragon's chin, suddenly lose it, still in the water.
explain_en: Beware of extreme joy turning to sorrow.

poem: 国有贤士，廷无佞臣，干戈不用，常享太平。
explain: 太平盛世，家庭和乐。
poem_en: Country has wise men, court has no flatterers. Weapons not used, enjoy peace forever.
explain_en: Peaceful times. Family harmony.

poem: 泰来否已极，诸事莫忧心，但须 养元福，做些好事，行些方便，一点丹灵独得真。
explain: 示人以心性修养，积功好义之道理。
poem_en: Tai comes after Pi extremes, do not worry about things. But must cultivate original blessing, do good deeds, act conveniently. One point of spiritual elixir alone gets the truth.
explain_en: Cultivate character. Do good deeds.

poem: 民乐业，官吏清，雍熙之世复见于今，告诸人千秋鸿业，仗此望明君。
explain: 得签者为首脑时，应立求属下各安其位，各部门主管廉洁公正。
poem_en: People enjoy their work, officials are clear. World of Yongxi seen again today. Tell everyone eternal great karma, rely on this to hope for wise ruler.
explain_en: Leaders should ensure subordinates are in place and honest.

poem: 安如泰山，稳如磐石，放胆前行，中通外直。
explain: 大吉大利。
poem_en: Safe as Mount Tai, steady as a rock. Go forward boldly, open inside and straight outside.
explain_en: Great luck.

poem: 月中有丹桂，人终攀不着，云梯足下生，此际好落脚。
explain: 远大目标不易实现，如有匡助之力或引荐之人，也就获得成功机会。
poem_en: Moon has cinnabar cassia, people cannot reach it. Cloud ladder grows under feet, good place to land now.
explain_en: Ambitious goal hard to reach. With help, success is possible.

poem: 天间一孤雁，嘹唳叹离群，试问知君者，而今有几人。
explain: 失意者之孤寂与无奈，得此签者，宜调整处世态度，以此为诫。
poem_en: A lone goose in the sky, crying about leaving the flock. Ask who knows you, how many people now.
explain_en: Loneliness of the frustrated. Adjust attitude.

poem: 红叶无颜色，凋零一夜风，邻鸡醒午梦，心事总成空。
explain: 好运瞬即逝，理想忽受阻碍，办事难有成就。
poem_en: Red leaves have no color, withered by one night of wind. Neighbor's chicken wakes noon dream, heart matters all become empty.
explain_en: Good luck passes quickly. Ideal blocked. Hard to achieve.

poem: 事如麻，理多错，日掩云中，空成耽搁。
explain: 所问之事情况混乱，时运不佳，事多蹉跎，一无所成。
poem_en: Matters like hemp, reasons mostly wrong. Sun hidden in clouds, delay in vain.
explain_en: Chaotic situation. Bad luck. Wasted time. Nothing achieved.

poem: 勿上旧辙，甘驾新车，东西南北，稳步康衢。
explain: 慎防勿蹈前车之覆辙，宁可改弦更张，另作他图。
poem_en: Do not go on old tracks, willing to drive new car. East, West, South, North, steady steps on thoroughfare.
explain_en: Do not repeat mistakes. Change course.

poem: 夜梦被鼠惊，醒来不见人，终宵废寝，直到天明。
explain: 不祥之兆，近时或有惊险之事，(可能应验於鼠年，鼠日或属鼠之人)，小心。
poem_en: Night dream startled by rat, wake up see no one. Sleepless all night, until dawn.
explain_en: Ominous sign. Danger recently. (Rat year/day/person).

poem: 秋霜肃，夏日炎，新花鲜了旧花淹，世情看冷暖，逢者不须言。
explain: 凡事靠自己，依赖别人不可靠。
poem_en: Autumn frost is severe, summer sun is hot. New flowers fresh, old flowers drowned. Worldly sentiments are cold and warm, no need to speak when meeting.
explain_en: Rely on yourself. Others are unreliable.

poem: 未展英雄志，驰驱不惮劳，敢将休咎卜，西北夺前标。
explain: 不避劳苦，慎选致力方向。
poem_en: Hero's ambition not unfolded, driving without fear of labor. Dare to divine good and bad, seize the prize in Northwest.
explain_en: Do not fear hardship. Choose direction carefully.

poem: 疴染沈沈，终日昏昏，雷门一震，体健身轻。
explain: 如问疾病，暂难痊愈，尚需时日，以得名医。
poem_en: Sickness is deep, groggy all day. Thunder shakes, body becomes healthy and light.
explain_en: Illness hard to cure immediately. Need time and good doctor.

poem: 易非易，难非难，忽地起波澜，欢笑两三番。
explain: 所问之事，呈胶着状，惟会突起变化，所有问题迎刃而解。
poem_en: Easy not easy, hard not hard. Suddenly waves rise, laughter two or three times.
explain_en: Stuck situation. Sudden change. Problems solved.

poem: 路不通，门闭塞，谨慎提防，云藏月黑。
explain: 不祥。
poem_en: Road blocked, door closed. Be cautious, clouds hide the black moon.
explain_en: Ominous.

poem: 蜗角蝇头利，而今已变通，草头人笑汝，宜始不宜终。
explain: 贪图小利，成不了大事，即使想通而暂不斤斤计较，恐也有始无终，旧态复萌。
poem_en: Snail horn and fly head profit, now accommodated. Grass top people laugh at you, suitable to start not suitable to end.
explain_en: Greedy for small profit, cannot achieve big things. Good start bad end.

poem: 珠玉走盘中，田园定阜丰，休言谋未遂，此去便亨通。
explain: 努力必有代价，但须耐心等待。
poem_en: Pearls and jade roll in the plate, fields and gardens definitely abundant. Do not say plan not fulfilled, this trip will be prosperous.
explain_en: Effort pays off. Wait patiently.

poem: 月已明，花再发，事悠悠，无不合。
explain: 得此签者，所问诸事均处於最佳状态，事事称心如意。
poem_en: Moon is bright, flowers bloom again. Matters are leisurely, nothing does not fit.
explain_en: Best state. Everything goes as wished.

poem: 朦胧秋月映朱门，林外鸟声远寺僧，自有贵人来接引，何须巧语似流莺。
explain: 命中有贵人相助，安份守己以待机运。
poem_en: Hazy autumn moon reflects on red door, bird sounds outside forest, distant temple monk. Noble person comes to guide, no need for clever words like orioles.
explain_en: Noble help in destiny. Be content and wait for luck.

poem: 事未宽，心不安，疑虑久，始安然。
explain: 所问诸事处在急於解决却未能解决之状况，不过最後终能渡过难关。
poem_en: Matter not wide, heart uneasy. Doubts for a long time, begin to be at peace.
explain_en: Anxious to solve but cannot. Finally will pass the difficulty.

poem: 虚名虚位久沈沈，禄马当求未见真，一片彩云秋後至，去年风物一时新。
explain: 终年碌碌营钻，每得虚有其表之名位，但等秋後(或中年以後)将时来运转。
poem_en: False fame and position sinking for long, salary and horse sought but not true. A piece of colorful cloud comes after autumn, scenery of last year is fresh for a time.
explain_en: Busy for nothing. False fame. Luck turns after autumn/middle age.

poem: 止止止，有终有始，似月如花，守成而已。
explain: 成败得失，莫不缘於因果循环之定数，不必强求。
poem_en: Stop, stop, stop. There is end and start. Like moon like flower, just keeping achievements.
explain_en: Success and failure are destiny. Do not force it.

poem: 明月全圆，颜色欣然，风云相送，和合万年。
explain: 大吉大利，所问诸事均得圆满达成，更能得锦上添花之美。
poem_en: Full moon completely round, colors are joyful. Wind and clouds send off, harmony for ten thousand years.
explain_en: Great luck. Everything fulfilled. Icing on the cake.

poem: 宝镜新，照两人，心中结，合同心。
explain: 得此签者，即将成婚，或已成婚，双方情投意合生活美满，如问合夥，亦可大发。
poem_en: Precious mirror is new, reflects two people. Knot in heart, union of same heart.
explain_en: Marriage coming or happy marriage. Partnership profitable.

poem: 居下不亲上，人心易散离，事机终失一，凡百尽成灰。
explain: 居上者倨傲、偏狭，居下者离心，最後关键时刻，招致失败。
poem_en: Those below do not love those above, human hearts easily scatter. Opportunity lost by one, everything turns to ash.
explain_en: Arrogant leader, alienated followers. Failure at critical moment.

poem: 兀兀尘埃久待时，幽窗寂静有谁知，若逢青紫人相引，财利功名自可期。
explain: 得此签者，时运欠畅，有志未伸，须明提携之人，前途始有望。
poem_en: Dusty and waiting for time for long, who knows the quiet window. If meeting a person in purple/green to guide, wealth and fame can be expected.
explain_en: Luck not smooth. Ambition not stretched. Need a mentor.

poem: 虎伏在路途，行人莫乱呼，路旁须仔细，灾祸自然无。
explain: 遇事小心仔细，否则有招致横祸之可能。
poem_en: Tiger crouching on the road, pedestrians do not call wildly. Be careful by the roadside, disaster naturally vanishes.
explain_en: Be careful. Otherwise disaster.

poem: 和不和，同不同，翻云覆雨几成空，进退须防终少功。
explain: 不吉，如问事业，纠纷不断，如问亲情友情婚姻，则神离而貌亦不合，进退小心。
poem_en: Harmony not harmonious, same not same. Clouds turn to rain, almost empty. Advance and retreat, beware of little merit in the end.
explain_en: Inauspicious. Career disputes. Relationship estranged. Be careful.

poem: 东边事，西边成，风物月华明，高楼弄笛声。
explain: 得此签者，所谋之事於闲散自在中，不期然而有所成。
poem_en: Matter in East, success in West. Scenery and moonlight are bright. Flute sound in high tower.
explain_en: Success comes unexpectedly in leisure.

poem: 事团圆，物周旋，一来一往，平步青天。
explain: 此签大吉，所问诸事都很圆满，得此签者财运奇佳，本利相滚，财货盈仓。
poem_en: Matter round, object circulates. One comes one goes, walking on blue sky.
explain_en: Great luck. Everything round. Wealth rolls in.

poem: 浅水起风波，平地生荆棘，言语虑参商，犹恐无端的。
explain: 衰运当头，即便慎言亦惹是非，故应少言，甚至不言。
poem_en: Wind and waves in shallow water, thorns grow on flat ground. Speech fears conflict, afraid of no aim.
explain_en: Bad luck. Careful speech causes trouble. Better be silent.

poem: 秋月云开後，薰风雨过时，若逢楚国旧知己，等闲一荐不须疑。
explain: 如处平顺之境遇，如有他乡旧知求己引荐则可为之，否则如所求过奢者，宜多虑。
poem_en: After autumn moon clouds open, when warm wind and rain pass. If meeting old friend from Chu, an ordinary recommendation should not be doubted.
explain_en: Smooth environment. Recommendation from old friend is good. Don't ask for too much.

poem: 心已定，事何忧，金鳞已上钩，功名一网收。
explain: 吉祥，所问诸事，心意已决，即可达成，同时功成名就。
poem_en: Heart decided, why worry about the matter. Gold scales already on hook, fame and profit collected in one net.
explain_en: Auspicious. Determined heart leads to success.

poem: 意迷己不迷，事宽心不宽，要知端的信，犹隔两重山。
explain: 凡事未可乐观。
poem_en: Mind confused self not confused, matter wide heart not wide. To know the true news, still separated by two mountains.
explain_en: Cannot be optimistic yet.

poem: 笑中生不足，内外见愁哭，云散月光辉，转祸当成福。
explain: 凡事仅看表面自有不足，阻碍或能排除，祸事亦能成福庇。
poem_en: Insufficient in laughter, sorrow and crying inside and out. Clouds scatter moon shines, turning disaster to blessing.
explain_en: Surface looks insufficient. Obstacles removed. Disaster turns to blessing.

poem: 檐前鹊噪正翩翩，忧虑全消喜自然，一人进了一人退，下梢还有好姻缘。
explain: 事情已安排妥当，全无冲突，若问姻缘，即可结合。
poem_en: Magpie chatters before the eaves, worries gone, joy natural. One person advances one retreats, good marriage in the end.
explain_en: Arranged properly. No conflict. Marriage can be united.

poem: 荆棘生平地，风波起四方，倚栏惆怅望，无语对斜阳。
explain: 或有烦心之事来临，内心忧闷无人谅解。
poem_en: Thorns grow on flat ground, wind and waves rise from four sides. Leaning on railing looking sadly, silent towards setting sun.
explain_en: Troublesome things coming. Inner sorrow no one understands.

poem: 谋已定，事何忧，照月上重楼，云中客点头。
explain: 大局安排已定，不必多作考虑。
poem_en: Plan decided, why worry. Moon shines on high tower, guest in clouds nods.
explain_en: Arranged. No need to worry.

poem: 奇奇奇，地利与天时，灯花传信後，动静总相宜。
explain: 所问诸事，成败在於天时与地利。
poem_en: Strange, strange, strange. Location and timing. After lamp flower sends news, movement and stillness are suitable.
explain_en: Success depends on timing and location.

poem: 遇不遇，逢不逢，月沈海底，人在梦中。
explain: 所问诸事均在虚无飘渺中。
poem_en: Meet or not meet, encounter or not encounter. Moon sinks in sea bottom, person in dream.
explain_en: Everything is vague.

poem: 暗中防霹雳，猜虑浑无实，转眼黑云收，拥出扶桑日。
explain: 所耽忧之事均属子虚乌有，很快就能真相大白。
poem_en: Guard against thunder in dark, suspicion is totally false. In a blink black clouds gather, sun comes out from Fusang.
explain_en: Worries are false. Truth will come out soon.

poem: 利在中邦出战时，一番获馈在王庭，凤衔丹诏归阳畔，得享佳名四海荣。
explain: 此签今人问卜，不易作作妥贴解述，大意为立功异邦，归享盛名。
poem_en: Benefit in war in central state, gifts in royal court. Phoenix carries decree to sun side, enjoy good name and glory everywhere.
explain_en: Merit in foreign land. Return with fame.

poem: 堪叹外边忧，更嗟门里闹，意绪更牵缠，心神亦颠倒。
explain: 不吉之兆，得此签者处於公私纷繁，困扰重重之境。
poem_en: Sighing over outside worries, lamenting inside noise. Mood tangled, spirit upside down.
explain_en: Inauspicious. Public and private troubles.

poem: 一重山一重水，风波道坦然，壶中有别天。
explain: 如问机构内之事，则虽风波重重，终能安然，问家务事，因妇女高妙，亦安。
poem_en: One mountain one water, wind and waves are calm. Another sky in the pot.
explain_en: Organization has waves but safe. Family safe.

poem: 遇险不须忧，风波何足忌，若遇草头人，咫尺青云路。
explain: 吉祥，化险为夷，若遇贵人，将可发迹。(贵人或可注意姓名有草字头者)。
poem_en: Don't worry about danger, why fear wind and waves. If meeting 'Grass Head' person, blue clouds road is close.
explain_en: Auspicious. Danger turns to safety. Noble person (Surname with Grass radical?).

poem: 船棹中流急，花开春又离，事宁心不静，惹起许多疑。
explain: 心情纷乱，办事虑深，时运犹待新春，旅外慎防不测，婚姻出现暗礁。
poem_en: Boat oars fast in midstream, flowers bloom spring leaves again. Matter calm heart not quiet, causing many doubts.
explain_en: Confused mind. Wait for new spring. Travel caution. Marriage reef.

poem: 可蓄可储，片玉寸珠，停停稳稳，前遇良图。
explain: 不可浪费，遇良机时始能大展鸿图。
poem_en: Can save and store, piece of jade inch of pearl. Steady and stable, meeting good plan ahead.
explain_en: Do not waste. Wait for good opportunity.

poem: 小子早趋庭，青云久问程，贵人来助力，花谢子还成。
explain: 早给子女适切教导，可望使其得到贵人相助，并实现愿望。
poem_en: Son hurries to court early, asks about journey to blue clouds. Noble person comes to help, flowers fade seeds form.
explain_en: Teach children early. Noble help. Wish fulfilled.

poem: 一心两事，一事两心，新花枯树，直待交春。
explain: 得此签者有心意不专，*之过急之毛病，未改之前难有成就。
poem_en: One heart two matters, one matter two hearts. New flowers on withered tree, wait for spring.
explain_en: Mind not focused. Impatient. No success until changed.

poem: 大事恐难图；残花不再鲜。
explain: 时机已逝，时光已老，欲图大事，已不可能。
poem_en: Great matter hard to plan; leftover flowers no longer fresh.
explain_en: Time passed. Too old. Impossible to plan big things.

poem: 莫道事无讹，其中进退多，桂轮圆又缺，光彩更揩磨。
explain: 好事多磨。
poem_en: Do not say matter has no error, many advances and retreats in it. Moon round and missing, brightness polished more.
explain_en: Good things take grinding.

poem: 莫叹事迟留，休言不到头，长竿终入手，一钓上金钩。
explain: 有耐心、恒心，最後终能如愿。
poem_en: Do not sigh over delay, do not say it won't end. Long pole finally in hand, one fish on gold hook.
explain_en: Patience and perseverance lead to success.

poem: 事称应有忌，未为恐先踬，欲往且迟迟，还须借势力。
explain: 不必*之过急，须仰人相助，或有所成。
poem_en: Matter called should have taboos, not done fear stumbling first. Want to go but slow, must borrow power.
explain_en: Don't be hasty. Rely on help.

poem: 足不安，舆不安，两两事相得，忧来却又欢。
explain: 塞翁失马，焉知非福，有时这样也不对，那样也不对，合在一起却带来好运。
poem_en: Foot uneasy, cart uneasy. Two things match, worry comes then joy.
explain_en: Blessing in disguise. Together brings good luck.

poem: 鼎折足，车脱辐，有贵人，重整续。
explain: 所问诸事於开始非常不顺，命中有贵人相助，事情得以重整。
poem_en: Cauldron breaks leg, cart loses spoke. There is noble person, reorganize and continue.
explain_en: Start is very unsmooth. Noble help. Reorganize.

poem: 参详言语，波涛扬沸，事久无伤，时间不利。
explain: 得此签者，恐有诉讼，或与人订约始终无法谈拢，亦或与人长时间有口舌之辩。
poem_en: Consulting words, waves boiling. Long time no harm, time is unfavorable.
explain_en: Lawsuit or contract negotiation failure. Long argument.

poem: 贵客自相亲，功名唾手成，获金须积德，仰望太阳升。
explain: 得此签者注定显达，但需注意积德，否则将很快失去一切。
poem_en: Noble guest naturally close, fame achieved easily. To get gold must accumulate virtue, look up at sun rising.
explain_en: Destined to be prominent. Accumulate virtue or lose everything.

poem: 平地起波澜，所求事日难，笑谈终有忌，同心事觉欢。
explain: 目前机运欠佳，须与知心友朋共事，庶几无患。
poem_en: Waves rise on flat ground, sought matter becomes hard daily. Jokes have taboos, same heart matters happy.
explain_en: Bad luck. Work with close friends to be safe.

poem: 狂风吹起墨云飞，月在天心遮不得，闲时无事暂相关，到底依然无克剥。
explain: 所问之事或人，如天心之月，皎洁无垢，非黑云所能遮掩。
poem_en: Wild wind blows black clouds fly, moon in sky center cannot be covered. Idle time temporarily related, in the end no exploitation.
explain_en: Matter/Person is like moon, pure. Cannot be covered by black clouds.

poem: 人倚楼，许多愁，澹然进步，事始无忧。
explain: 独处深思，总觉不悦，若能眼光放远，自然无忧。
poem_en: Person leaning on tower, many worries. Calmly progress, matter starts without worry.
explain_en: Solitary and unhappy. Look far ahead, no worry.

poem: 一点着阳春，枯枝朵朵新，志专方遇合，切忌二三心。
explain: 心志专一始能受到重视，略得提携即可步入佳境。
poem_en: One point touches spring, withered branches new. Ambition focused then meet, avoid two or three hearts.
explain_en: Focus leads to recognition. Promotion.

poem: 道路迢遥，门庭闭塞，雾拥去兮，云开见日。
explain: 应守时待运。
poem_en: Road far away, door blocked. Fog covers, clouds open see sun.
explain_en: Wait for time and luck.

poem: 鱼上钩，丝纶弱，收拾难，力再着。
explain: 将得手之机会或财物，由於条件不济，力量不足，无法承受，须再加努力。
poem_en: Fish on hook, line is weak. Hard to collect, use strength again.
explain_en: Opportunity/Wealth hard to hold due to insufficient strength. Try harder.

poem: 相引更相牵，殷勤喜自然，施为无不利，愁事转团圆。
explain: 得此签者，平时乐於助人，故人际关系良好，事事均如意。
poem_en: Guiding and pulling, diligence brings natural joy. Action has no disadvantage, sad things turn round.
explain_en: Helpful person. Good relationships. Everything goes well.

poem: 疑疑疑，一番笑罢一番悲，落红满地无人扫，独对西风怅黛眉。
explain: 凡猜疑之事，不可冒然尝试，须再三思考探求真相，方作决定，免乐极生悲。
poem_en: Doubt, doubt, doubt. One laugh then one sorrow. Fallen red flowers on ground no one sweeps, alone facing west wind with sad eyebrows.
explain_en: Don't try suspicious things. Think thrice. Avoid sorrow.

poem: 上下不和同，劳而未有功，出门通大道，从此保初终。
explain: 与其在一个意见分歧不合之团体里，不如及早退出，另创局面。
poem_en: Top and bottom not harmonious, labor without merit. Go out to main road, protect beginning and end from there.
explain_en: Leave discordant group. Create new situation.

poem: 大事可成功，有益还无咎，云中执鞭人，报在三秋後。
explain: 异人指点，凡事顺利，事成日在三秋後(三秋:三年，秋季三个月，或秋季第三个月。
poem_en: Great matter can succeed, benefit without blame. Person holding whip in clouds, report after three autumns.
explain_en: Guidance from stranger. Smooth. Success after 3 years/autumns.

poem: 桑榆催暮景，缺月恐难圆，若遇刀锥客，方知喜自然。
explain: 事情已到穷途末路，想有转机亦难，惟亦不必过於颓丧，能保性命即属庆幸。
poem_en: Mulberry and elm urge evening scenery, missing moon hard to round. If meeting knife/awl guest, know joy is natural.
explain_en: Dead end. Hard to turn. Saving life is lucky.

poem: 遍书前後事，艰险往来难，若得清风便，扁舟过远山。
explain: 所问之事颇难如愿，须待天时。
poem_en: Written all past and future, danger hard to go back and forth. If getting fair wind, small boat crosses distant mountains.
explain_en: Hard to get wish. Wait for heaven's time.

poem: 莫叹残花，花开枯树，屋头春意，喜笑嘻嘻。
explain: 得此签者，恐有失意事，惟转机已现。
poem_en: Do not sigh over leftover flowers, flowers bloom on withered tree. Spring meaning at house head, laughing happily.
explain_en: Disappointment. But turning point appears.

poem: 一事总成空，一事还成喜，若遇口边人，心下堪凭委。
explain: 凡进行之事，均属得失互参，与人交往洽事，若得遇亲信可靠之人，方可心安。
poem_en: One matter totally empty, one matter becomes joy. If meeting person by mouth, heart can rely.
explain_en: Gain and loss mixed. Trust reliable person.

poem: 欲得月中兔，须凭桃李拂，高山来接引，双喜照双眉。
explain: 要得到不易到手之物，非借不凡之力。
poem_en: Want to get rabbit in moon, must rely on peach and plum ladder. High mountain comes to guide, double joy on eyebrows.
explain_en: Hard to get item needs extraordinary help.

poem: 事遂勿忧煎，春风喜自然，更垂三尺钩，得意获鳞鲜。
explain: 大吉，所问诸事均能如愿，且喜事连连。
poem_en: Matter fulfilled don't worry, spring wind joy natural. Drop three foot hook, proudly catch fresh scale.
explain_en: Great luck. Wishes fulfilled. Happy events.

poem: 圆又缺，缺又圆，低低密密要周旋，时来始见缘。
explain: 要求功德圆满，但凭个人造化，机缘如何，所问诸事均如此。
poem_en: Round and missing, missing and round. Low and dense to socialize, fate seen when time comes.
explain_en: Perfection depends on luck. Everything is like this.

poem: 乘病马，上危坡，防失跌，见蹉跎。
explain: 屋漏又遭连夜雨，船破偏遇当头风，衰透至极。
poem_en: Ride sick horse, up dangerous slope. Guard against falling, see蹉跎.
explain_en: Bad luck on top of bad luck. Extremely declined.

poem: 两事已和同，轻舟遇便风，道迷人得意，歌唱急流中。
explain: 得意勿忘形，忘形恐有灾。
poem_en: Two matters already harmonious, light boat meets fair wind. Way lost person proud, singing in rapid current.
explain_en: Don't get carried away. Danger in pride.

poem: 白玉蒙尘，黄金埋土，久久光辉，也须人举。
explain: 虽有才华却遭埋没，须待有心人来提拔重用。
poem_en: White jade covered in dust, gold buried in earth. Long time brilliance, needs person to lift.
explain_en: Talent buried. Needs someone to promote.

poem: 上接不稳，下接不和，相缠相扰，平地风波。
explain: 无论在团体、在家庭或社会，上下皆不相容，经年纠葛不清。
poem_en: Upper connection unstable, lower connection discordant. Tangled and disturbing, wind and waves on flat ground.
explain_en: Incompatible top and bottom. Endless entanglement.

poem: 背後笑嘻嘻，中行道最宜，所求终有望，不必皱双眉。
explain: 心中所愿终可实现，何必愁眉深锁？
poem_en: Smiling behind back, walking in middle is best. What is sought is hopeful, no need to frown.
explain_en: Wish will come true. Why worry?

poem: 憔悴无人问，林间听杜鹃，一声山月笛，千里泪涓涓。
explain: 此签指一对恋人，因云山相阻，相思成疾，或谓，一人命运孤苦，事多伤感。
poem_en: Haggard no one asks, hearing cuckoo in forest. One sound of flute under mountain moon, tears flowing for a thousand miles.
explain_en: Lovers separated. Or lonely fate. Sadness.

poem: 菱荷香里受深恩，桂魄圆时印绶新，从此威名山岳重，光辉直上位丝纶。
explain: 此签如专就宦途而言，诚属上上大吉，可谓官运亨通，青云直上。
poem_en: Receiving deep grace in lotus fragrance, new seal when moon is full. From now fame heavy as mountains, glory straight to silk ribbon.
explain_en: Official career: Great luck. Promotion.

poem: 花落正逢春，行人在半程，事成还不就，索绊两三旬。
explain: 任何事均不得其时，尤其最近一月内，须防有所阻碍，诸事稍慢，等待转机。
poem_en: Flowers fall meeting spring, traveler halfway. Matter done but not accomplished, entangled for two or three weeks.
explain_en: Not the right time. Obstacles in next month. Wait.

poem: 欲行还止，徘徊不已，动摇莫强，得止且止。
explain: 此签示人，若三心二意去做一件事，出於勉强，则一动不如一静。
poem_en: Want to go but stop, wandering endlessly. Shaking do not force, stop if you can stop.
explain_en: Indecisive. Forced action. Better to be quiet.

poem: 心下事安然，周旋尚未全，逢龙还有吉，人月永团圆。
explain: 所问诸事，虽未圆满解决，但必能安然无虞，若遇龙(龙年或属龙之人)自有吉兆。
poem_en: Heart matter peaceful, socialization not yet complete. Meeting Dragon brings luck, people and moon round forever.
explain_en: Not fully resolved but safe. Dragon year/person brings luck.

poem: 梦里说关山，波深下钓难，利名终有望，目下未开颜。
explain: 总想换个新环境或工作，然却却不知如何着手，日後或有机运，目下尚不乐观。
poem_en: Dreaming of mountain pass, water deep hard to fish. Fame and profit hopeful, eyes not yet smiling.
explain_en: Want to change environment but don't know how. Future opportunity, not now.

poem: 三箭开云路，营求指日成，许多闲口语，翻作笑歌声。
explain: 此签属机运亨通之签，尤对谋事、创业者而言。
poem_en: Three arrows open cloud road, seeking success in days. Many idle words, turned into laughter and song.
explain_en: Good luck. Especially for business/entrepreneurship.

poem: 休眷恋，误前程，终闹乱，出门庭。
explain: 莫为意中人或原留之地恋恋不舍，而误未来大事，不如早去为妙，免生祸乱。
poem_en: Do not be attached, mistake future. End in noise, leave the house.
explain_en: Don't cling to person/place and miss big things. Leave early.

poem: 万里波涛静，一天风月闲，利名无阻隔，行路出重关。
explain: 大吉。
poem_en: Ten thousand miles waves calm, one day wind and moon idle. No obstacle to fame and profit, walking out of heavy passes.
explain_en: Great luck.

poem: 渴望梅， 画饼，漫劳心，如捉影，遇虎龙，方可省。
explain: 得此签者，恐有幻想之习，应即改之。
poem_en: Craving plums, painting cakes. Wasting heart, like catching shadows. Meet Tiger and Dragon, then can wake up.
explain_en: Fantasy habit. Change it.

poem: 事迷心不迷，事宽心不宽，一场欢喜会，不久出重关。
explain: 单办一项行业、活动或进行一件事，多力不从心，若有多人相助，则望可成。
poem_en: Matter confused heart not confused, matter wide heart not wide. A happy gathering, soon out of heavy passes.
explain_en: Alone is hard. With help, success is hopeful.

poem: 夜半渡无船，惊涛恐拍天，月斜云淡处，音信有人传。
explain: 得此签者，诸事不宜冒进，宜於天时、地利、人和俱备之後再行动。
poem_en: No boat at midnight crossing, waves fear hitting sky. Moon slanting clouds pale, someone sends news.
explain_en: Don't be rash. Act when conditions are ready.

poem: 事若羁留，人不出头，往来闭塞，要见无有。
explain: 从事任何事，以谨慎机敏为上。
poem_en: Matter if detained, person does not stand out. Traffic blocked, want to see nothing.
explain_en: Be cautious and alert.

poem: 万里片帆转，波平浪不惊，行行无阻滞，远处更通津。
explain: 所问诸事一向稳妥顺利，日後扩展，更属定*胜券。
poem_en: Ten thousand miles sail turns, waves calm not startled. Walking without obstruction, distance connects to ferry.
explain_en: Everything steady and smooth. Expansion is sure to win.

poem: 身历惊涛，东风便好，太平身退，目下还早。
explain: 此签对告老退休者，颇合其解，如问他事，则属有惊无险之局，刻下尚难抽身。
poem_en: Body experienced stormy waves, East wind is good. Retire in peace, currently still early.
explain_en: Good for retirement. For others, dangerous but safe. Hard to withdraw now.

poem: 鹤自云中出，人从月下归，新欢盈脸上，不用皱双眉。
explain: 吉祥，无所不利。
poem_en: Crane comes out of clouds, person returns under moon. New joy on face, no need to frown.
explain_en: Auspicious. Nothing unfavorable.

poem: 深潭鱼可钓，幽谷鸟可罗，只用久长心，不用生疑惑。
explain: 具有耐心，任何事均可成，不必怀疑。
poem_en: Fish in deep pool can be fished, bird in deep valley can be netted. Just use long-term heart, no need to doubt.
explain_en: Patience leads to success. Do not doubt.

poem: 进不安，退不可，上下相从，明珠一颗。
explain: 所问诸事，处於进退两难之境，须相关诸人上下一心，始有成功之望。
poem_en: Advance uneasy, retreat impossible. Up and down follow, a bright pearl.
explain_en: Dilemma. Needs unity of everyone to succeed.

poem: 着着占先机，其中路不迷，目前无合意，乍免是和非。
explain: 一向事事称心，如今却不再如意，但是非可免。
poem_en: Taking the initiative, road not lost. Currently not satisfactory, barely avoid right and wrong.
explain_en: Used to be smooth, now not. But trouble avoided.

poem: 雀噪高枝上，行人古渡头，半途不了事，日暮转生愁。
explain: 众说纷纭，莫衷一是，事情进行一半，成为日後愁苦之源。
poem_en: Sparrows chatter on high branch, traveler at old ferry. Halfway unfinished matter, sunset brings sorrow.
explain_en: Conflicting opinions. Halfway done creates future sorrow.

poem: 凿石得玉，淘沙得珠，眼前目下，何用踌躇。
explain: 得此签者，时运特佳，做任何事都会有意外之收获。
poem_en: Chisel stone get jade, wash sand get pearl. Right now before eyes, why hesitate.
explain_en: Great luck. Unexpected harvest in everything.

poem: 无端风雨催春去，落尽枝头桃李花，桃畔有人歌且笑，知君心事乱如麻。
explain: 好景不长，好花不再，避免小人挑拨坏事，幸灾乐祸。
poem_en: Wind and rain urge spring to leave, peach and plum flowers fall. Someone singing and laughing by the peach, knowing your heart is messy.
explain_en: Good times don't last. Beware of villains gloating.

poem: 阆苑一时春，庭前花柳新，声传好信息，草木尽欣欣。
explain: 所问诸事均吉祥如意。
poem_en: Spring in fairyland for a time, flowers and willows new in courtyard. Good news spreads, plants are joyful.
explain_en: Auspicious.

poem: 门外事重叠，阴人多遇合，贤女虽助巧，渺渺终难洽。
explain: 问卜之人处於小人当道，所负责之事又非内行，虽有贤女子相助，依然难成。
poem_en: Matters overlap outside door, women meet often. Although wise woman helps, vaguely hard to harmonize.
explain_en: Villains in power. Outsider in charge. Hard to succeed even with help.

poem: 事有喜，面有光，终始好商量，壶中日月长。
explain: 此签主得贤妻，家庭和谐，生活幸福，亦主妇女有喜。
poem_en: Joy in matter, light on face. Good to discuss start and end. Days and months long in the pot.
explain_en: Get a virtuous wife. Family harmony. Pregnancy.

poem: 暗去有明来，忧心事可谐，终须成一笑，目下莫疑猜。
explain: 暗去明来，明去暗来，冥冥之中自有定数。
poem_en: Dark goes and light comes, worried matter can be harmonized. End in a smile, do not guess now.
explain_en: Fate determines dark and light. Don't worry.

poem: 宝镜无尘染，金貂已剪裁，也逢天意合，终不惹尘埃。
explain: 好事成双，得此签者，正直、高贵，受天之恩宠，事事如意。
poem_en: Precious mirror no dust, gold mink cut. Heaven's will matches, never attract dust.
explain_en: Double happiness. Upright and noble. Favored by heaven.

poem: 和合事，笑谈成，喜音在半程，平步踏青云。
explain: 吉，婚事笑谈中说定，高升喜讯已在半途，双喜临门人生至乐。
poem_en: Harmonious matter, success in talking and laughing. Good news halfway, stepping on blue clouds.
explain_en: Marriage set in laughter. Promotion news on the way. Double joy.

poem: 花残月缺，镜破钗分，休来休往，事始安宁。
explain: 大不吉祥，诸事不宜，诸对婚姻论断，则尤不相宜，恐有劳燕分飞之虞。
poem_en: Flower faded moon missing, mirror broken hairpin divided. Stop coming and going, matter starts to be peaceful.
explain_en: Very ominous. Divorce likely. Stop everything.

poem: 门外好音来，生涯应有庆，名利有更迁，雁行终折阵。
explain: 此签前段昌吉喜庆，事多有成，末句寓有兄弟 墙之意，或兄弟中，恐有折损。
poem_en: Good news comes outside door, career should have celebration. Fame and profit change, goose row finally breaks formation.
explain_en: Good start. Success. But brothers/partners may separate or be damaged.

poem: 万里好江山，风沙尽日间，已吞钩上饵，何必遇波澜。
explain: 变起仓悴，即将达成之希望亦被预料不到之状况破坏无遗。
poem_en: Ten thousand miles good landscape, wind and sand all day. Bait swallowed on hook, why meet waves.
explain_en: Sudden change destroys near success.

poem: 双燕衔书舞，指日一齐来，寂寞淹留客，从兹下钓台。
explain: 所期盼之事或人，已指日可待。
poem_en: Double swallows carry letter and dance, coming together soon. Lonely guest staying, get off fishing platform from now.
explain_en: Expected person/matter coming soon.

poem: 望去几重山，高深渐可攀，举头天上看，明月在人间。
explain: 所问诸事看似高深莫测，只要不畏惧，终有明白一天。
poem_en: Looking at several mountains, high and deep gradually climbable. Look up at sky, bright moon in human world.
explain_en: Mysterious things will be clear. Don't fear.

poem: 用之则行，舍之则藏，一骑出重关，佳音咫尺间。
explain: 用人应用有志节及才干之人，并放手让他施展，很快即有成就。
poem_en: Use it then act, discard it then hide. One rider out of heavy pass, good news nearby.
explain_en: Use ambitious and capable people. Success soon.

poem: 积德施功有子孙， 牛祭神及西邻，功名两字成全日，回首山河万物新。
explain: 行善积德，泽被乡里，将来必有好报。
poem_en: Accumulate virtue and merit for descendants. Sacrifice to gods and neighbors. Fame fulfilled day, look back landscape new.
explain_en: Do good deeds. Good rewards.

poem: 安坦路平夷，云中一雁飞，桃花逢骤雨，水畔女频啼。
explain: 此签若对男女间相恋、婚姻、结 等，恐属大不利，如问他事，亦波折重重。
poem_en: Safe road flat and smooth, one goose flies in clouds. Peach blossom meets sudden rain, woman cries by water.
explain_en: Bad for love/marriage. Twists in other matters.

poem: 门内起干戈，亲仇两不和，朱衣临日月，始觉笑呵呵。
explain: 谨防家人失和，手足互残，并防身边亲人成仇家，小心翼翼，终可有成。
poem_en: War inside door, relatives and enemies not harmonious. Red robe approaches sun and moon, start to laugh.
explain_en: Family discord. Be careful. Success in the end.

poem: 有一人，获一鹿，事团圆，门外索。
explain: 所问事必成，但须防後患，如得财富将有人强分，得配偶则第三者纠 不放。
poem_en: There is a person, gets a deer. Matter round, rope outside door.
explain_en: Success but beware of trouble. Wealth divided, partner entangled.

poem: 汝往无攸利，花开又及秋，严霜物荐至，退步不存留。
explain: 不祥。
poem_en: You go no benefit, flowers bloom and reach autumn. Severe frost comes, retreat does not stay.
explain_en: Ominous.

poem: 新月为钩，清风作线，举网烟波，锦鳞易见。
explain: 佳，凡事得心应手，左右逢源。
poem_en: New moon as hook, clear wind as line. Lift net in misty waves, brocade scales easy to see.
explain_en: Good. Handy and successful.

poem: 先关锁，续提防，小节不知戒，因循成大殃。
explain: 因小失大，不怕一万，只怕万一，星星之火，亦可燎原。
poem_en: Lock first, continue to guard. Small details not cautioned, follow to big disaster.
explain_en: Small mistake leads to big disaster. Prevention is key.

poem: 燕语莺啼，花开满院，倚栏春睡觉，无语 愁颜。
explain: 时运已转，凡事可以顺利进行无阻。
poem_en: Swallows talk and orioles sing, flowers fill the courtyard. Leaning on railing spring sleep, speechless removing sorrow.
explain_en: Luck turned. Everything smooth.

poem: 劳心劳心，劳心有成，清风借力，欢笑前程。
explain: 随时留心、深思，自必於事有补，前途开朗。
poem_en: Labor heart, labor heart, labor heart has success. Clear wind borrows power, laughing at future.
explain_en: Be attentive and thoughtful. Future is bright.

poem: 进步且徘徊，春风柳絮吹，水边行客倦，枕畔有忧怀。
explain: 凡事求其循序渐进足矣，往往事将有成时又遭外来因素之阻扰。
poem_en: Progress and hesitate, spring wind blows willow catkins. Traveler tired by water, worry by pillow.
explain_en: Gradual progress. Obstacles when near success.

poem: 玉石犹终昧，那堪小悔多，终无咎，笑呵呵。
explain: 所问诸事由於当事人之昏昧，小错很多，但并无大碍。
poem_en: Jade and stone still obscure, how can bear small regrets. End no blame, laughing.
explain_en: Confused but small mistakes. No big harm.

poem: 垂翼遥天去，皆因避难行，一途经济意，又是满园春。
explain: 狼狈脱逃一时，免却一场灾祸，在经过一番折腾後，终将回到安适生活中。
poem_en: Drooping wings go to distant sky, all because of escaping disaster. A way of economy, again full garden spring.
explain_en: Escape disaster. Return to comfort after struggle.

poem: 佳信至，开笑颜，飞腾一去，拨云上天。
explain: 大吉大利之上上签，已有喜讯佳音，机运一到，即可平步青云，直上九重。
poem_en: Good news arrives, open smiling face. Fly away once, push clouds to sky.
explain_en: Great luck. Promotion. Success.

poem: 青毡空守旧，枝上巢生风，莫为一时喜，还疑此象凶。
explain: 不祥，应加谨防，困窘之境依旧，且有风雨飘摇之险。
poem_en: Green felt empty keeping old, nest on branch generates wind. Do not be happy for a moment, suspect this image is ominous.
explain_en: Inauspicious. Danger remains. Precarious.

poem: 莫言荆棘恶，终为鸾凤栖，目前应有待，何用早踌躇。
explain: 虽有阻碍，终将鸾凤合鸣，如问他事，则亦好事多磨，但终将如愿。
poem_en: Do not say thorns are evil, finally roost for phoenix. Wait for now, why hesitate early.
explain_en: Obstacles but happy ending. Patience needed.

poem: 上下和，忧愁决，千嶂云，一轮月。
explain: 家和万事兴。
poem_en: Up and down harmonious, sorrow resolved. Thousand peaks clouds, one wheel moon.
explain_en: Family harmony brings prosperity.

poem: 玉出昆冈石，舟离古渡滩，行藏终有望，用舍不为难。
explain: 某事或某人之底细即可水落石出，做抉择不会有困难。
poem_en: Jade out of Kunlun stone, boat leaves old ferry beach. Action and hiding hopeful, using and discarding not hard.
explain_en: Truth revealed. Decision easy.

poem: 目下意难舒，有客来徐徐，金车虽历险，吝必有终与。
explain: 阁下心事纠结不开，待客访友迟延难遇，日後处境将留怅恨。
poem_en: Mind hard to stretch now, guest comes slowly. Gold cart experienced danger, stingy has end.
explain_en: Tangled mind. Delay. Regret later.

poem: 可以寄，可以托，事迟迟，无舛错。
explain: 所问之事可以托付他人去办，不过进行缓慢，好在尚不至出错。
poem_en: Can send, can entrust. Matter slow, no error.
explain_en: Can entrust others. Slow but safe.

poem: 恐惧忧煎，皆在目前，若逢明鉴，指破空传。
explain: 所问诸事忧患深重，若得人指点迷津，或可化险为夷。
poem_en: Fear and worry, all before eyes. If meeting clear mirror, point out empty transmission.
explain_en: Deep worry. Need guidance to solve.

poem: 月掩云间，昏迷道路，云散月明，渐宜进步。
explain: 所问之事一时遭遇困阻，不辨路径，须排除障碍後，则再行进展可也。
poem_en: Moon hidden in clouds, lost way. Clouds scatter moon bright, gradually suitable to progress.
explain_en: Obstacle temporary. Progress after clearing.

poem: 道路狂招呼，风波一点无，时乖心绪乱，全仗贵人扶。
explain: 一切条件对已有利，亦无风险，奈合时运见拙而心烦意乱，唯有待贵人援手。
poem_en: Road crazy calling, no wind and waves. Time bad mind messy, rely on noble help.
explain_en: Conditions good but luck bad. Rely on help.

poem: 临渊放钩，清绝点埃，巨鳌随得，不用疑猜。
explain: 要致富须走险路，做了抉择之後就应耐心以待，不必患得患失。
poem_en: Cast hook in deep pool, clear cut dust. Giant turtle obtained, no need to guess.
explain_en: Take risk for wealth. Be patient.

poem: 无中应有直，心事还成戚，云散月重圆，千里风帆急。
explain: 平平，示人须以「浮云散，明月照人来」之心情，进行心中之事。
poem_en: Should be straight in nothing, heart matter becomes sorrow. Clouds scatter moon round again, thousand miles wind sail fast.
explain_en: Average. Clouds scatter moon shines.

poem: 造化生来信自然，师征千里福绵绵，功名得就神明助，蛇兔相逢定变迁。
explain: 大吉，人生有些际遇必靠福份及神佑，事情只要含有蛇、兔因素，必有变迁。
poem_en: Creation comes naturally, teacher conquers thousand miles blessing. Fame achieved with divine help, snake and rabbit meeting surely change.
explain_en: Great luck. Snake/Rabbit factors bring change.

poem: 大仗神威，群魔消灭，灭了又须威，神威亦极力，牢牢记取，免致久後失跌。
explain: 援引外力助达目的後，要对外力有适当控制，以免外力从此将已束缚，如举债。
poem_en: Rely on divine power, demons destroyed. Destroyed and need power again. Remember firmly, avoid falling later.
explain_en: Control external help. Don't be bound by it.

poem: 道必坚心，坚心必道成，建功勋，早回程，造茅庵，修真身，一日飞升，仙班列名。
explain: 勉人立身修业，勿图官宦之奢望，勿为功禄所贪恋。
poem_en: Dao must have firm heart, firm heart completes Dao. Establish merit, return early. Build hut, cultivate true body. Fly up one day, name in immortal class.
explain_en: Cultivate self. Don't be greedy for power.

poem: 一念上天堂，一念入地狱，地狱天堂，便分荣辱，自立念头要真，不可随人碌碌。
explain: 荣耀或羞辱取决人之一念之间，人云亦云，昏庸一生岂不可惜？
poem_en: One thought heaven, one thought hell. Hell heaven, separate glory and shame. Self thought must be true, do not follow others.
explain_en: Thought determines fate. Don't follow crowd.

poem: 羊逸群，日对民，逢牛口，便咬人，一个君一个臣，君臣有些惊，须仗真神拯救苍生。
explain: 所显诗句近乎玄虚，不适用现代，不妨再卜一签。
poem_en: Sheep escapes flock, day faces people. Meet cow mouth, then bite people. One ruler one minister, ruler and minister startled. Must rely on true god to save people.
explain_en: Vague. Try again.

poem: 若是有缘人，一指便回首，执迷不悟者，屡引也不走。
explain: 所问事已步入歧途，是否及时省悟回头，视问卜者是否有缘及个性是否执拗。
poem_en: If destined person, one finger turns head. Stubborn person, repeatedly guided not leaving.
explain_en: Turn back from wrong path. Depends on fate.

poem: 月儿升东，清光可挹，万里无云，海天一碧。
explain: 有好机运来，可以大放异彩，凡事均无阻塞，今後环境更趋有利。
poem_en: Moon rises east, clear light can be scooped. Ten thousand miles no clouds, sea and sky blue.
explain_en: Good luck coming. Shine brightly.

poem: 男儿若得封侯印，不负人间走一遭，功成身退烟霞啸傲，脱却紫罗袍，方是男儿道。
explain: 大功告成之後，自可封侯或退隐山林，而选择後者才是大丈夫行径。
poem_en: If man gets seal of nobility, not fail world trip. Success and retire, smoke and clouds proud. Take off purple robe, that is man's way.
explain_en: Retire after success.

poem: 心月狐狸，迷惑世人，世人不察，延久倾身。
explain: 世间有若干危害人体之嗜好，智者应以「妖狐」迷人为鉴。
poem_en: Heart moon fox, confuses world. People do not check, destroy body after long time.
explain_en: Beware of bad habits/addictions.

poem: 蓦地狂风起，大树尽掀扬，枝叶未凋零，培植终无恙。
explain: 有惊无险。
poem_en: Suddenly wild wind rises, big trees lifted. Branches and leaves not withered, cultivation finally safe.
explain_en: Shock but safe.

poem: 虚日旺相，法要推寻，四围旋绕，对敌冲营。
explain: 勿为假相所欺，应多方深入探讨真相。
poem_en: Sun calendar prosperous, method needs searching. Surround four sides, charge camp against enemy.
explain_en: Don't be deceived. Investigate truth.

poem: 荣枯早定莫嗟伤，辛苦他邦安享家乡，为他人作嫁衣裳，今日君尝，他年改调别人尝。
explain: 荣枯天定，不要为失意伤情，应乐天知命，得此签者恐刻下时运不佳。
poem_en: Glory and wither fixed early don't sigh. Hard work in foreign land enjoy home. Making wedding dress for others, you taste today, others taste another year.
explain_en: Fate fixed. Bad luck now. Working for others.

poem: 女儿大，喜临门，嫁良人，添子孙，同拜受，感皇恩。
explain: 吉祥，对儿女婚嫁、男女友谊、家室人丁等，更为称庆。
poem_en: Daughter grows up, joy at door. Marry good husband, add children. Worship together, feel royal grace.
explain_en: Auspicious. Marriage/Family good.

poem: 木生火，口不噤，疯癫作症，寒热相侵。
explain: 大不利，应谨言慎行，以防不测，免遭横事，此签於人为病痛，於事亦然。
poem_en: Wood generates fire, mouth not shut. Madness symptom, cold and heat invade.
explain_en: Very unfavorable. Watch speech. Illness/Disaster.

poem: 休休休，过了三年又六周，不猛省，祸到头。
explain: 在近三年半左右，尽量减少兴革异动，对过去所为加以反省，如此或可避祸。
poem_en: Stop, stop, stop. Passed three years and six weeks. Not reflected, disaster on head.
explain_en: No changes for 3.5 years. Reflect to avoid disaster.

poem: 槛栏起火，孽畜遭殃，预防得力，灭火成康。
explain: 凡事先防范於未然，才能安全无虑。
poem_en: Fence catches fire, livestock suffers. Prevention effective, extinguishing fire becomes health.
explain_en: Prevention is key.

poem: 已遂心头愿，始知志气伸，三山须把握，频频定太平。
explain: 事情办成後，仍应持谨慎戒惧之心，否则恐出差错，使前功尽弃。
poem_en: Wish fulfilled, ambition stretched. Grasp three mountains, frequently settle peace.
explain_en: Be cautious after success.

poem: 福星照映，桂子香闻，满天星斗，光耀*人。
explain: 大吉大利，命中注定有神明护佑，逢秋八月或有贵人相助。
poem_en: Lucky star shines, cassia fragrance smelled. Sky full of stars, light dazzles people.
explain_en: Great luck. Divine protection. Autumn/August noble help.

poem: 东南北将来成故墟，燕蓟地苍生无存济，若要大奋雄心，水源不知何处？
explain: 环境至为险恶，既有近忧，又有远患，如想绝地求生，应先求取活命水源。
poem_en: East South North will become ruins, Yan Ji land people not saved. If want to exert ambition, where is water source?
explain_en: Dangerous environment. Find survival resource first.

poem: 死有日，生有时，何事慢踌躇，飘然一往，心上无疑。
explain: 人生一切莫不有定数，对事不必过於计较。
poem_en: Death has day, life has time. Why hesitate slow. Float away, no doubt in heart.
explain_en: Destiny fixed. Don't be calculating.

poem: 往来行僻处，猝然着一惊，豺狼若当道，斩灭方称心。
explain: 进行之事突遇凶险，须拿勇气排除，事情方可顺利，得此签者恐有受惊吓之事。
poem_en: Walking in remote place, suddenly startled. If wolves block way, kill them to be happy.
explain_en: Sudden danger. Courage needed to solve.

poem: 八门分八位，九星布九方，青赤黄白黑，五色卷锦装，交锋对垒，两两相当。
explain: 此签恐系诸葛当年用兵制敌之策略，所卜之事可能双方实力相当。
poem_en: Eight gates divide eight positions, nine stars layout nine directions. Green red yellow white black, five colors roll brocade. Confrontation, two equal.
explain_en: Equal strength.

poem: 终身不习上，在世却枉然，轮回不能免，永落深坑堑。
explain: 劝人不能昏 渡日。
poem_en: Lifelong not learning up, living in vain. Reincarnation unavoidable, fall into deep pit forever.
explain_en: Don't live in confusion.

poem: 两个子女，同到齐行，阴阳和合，谋作欢欣。
explain: 得此签者可望得一子一女，亦可能一举得男女各一之双胞胎，凡事求阴阳调和。
poem_en: Two children, walking together. Yin and Yang harmonious, planning happy.
explain_en: Get son and daughter (or twins). Harmony.

poem: 中有玄机赋，鸡鸣方显露，猛然悟禅关，打破君门路。
explain: 所问诸事疑难未解，但很快就能悟出解决之道。
poem_en: Mystery in it, revealed when rooster crows. Suddenly realize Zen gate, break ruler's door road.
explain_en: Mystery solved soon (Rooster time/year?).

poem: 数尾金鱼吞饵，丝竿钓了回头，家食翻嫌太贵，五湖四海遨游。
explain: 意外之好运，有时不是福气反成负担。
poem_en: Several goldfish swallow bait, fishing rod turned back. Home food disliked as expensive, roam five lakes and four seas.
explain_en: Windfall might be burden.

poem: 卯日儿出林，午时正福临，卯生於寅，方见天心。
explain: 天时依一定顺序运转，做任何事不能违背自然法则。
poem_en: Rabbit sun comes out of forest, noon time blessing arrives. Rabbit born in Tiger, see heaven's heart.
explain_en: Follow natural order.

poem: 日中不决，日到方明，一场好事，六耳同成。
explain: 所问事一两日内尚难定，日子到了事情自明朗，应为三个人合力办成之好事。
poem_en: No decision at noon, clear when day arrives. A good matter, six ears complete together.
explain_en: Wait a few days. Three people cooperation.

poem: 孤宿是妖星，猿猴及树精，入山遇此曜，迷了性和心。
explain: 此签示人：孤独易於受惑。
poem_en: Lone star is demon star, ape and tree spirit. Meet this star in mountain, confuse nature and heart.
explain_en: Loneliness makes one easily confused.

poem: 滴漏声催鸡唱，趱行人逐队放，晚渡关津，前程无量。
explain: 全力以赴，必有所成。
poem_en: Drip sound urges rooster crow, hurry travelers released in group. Late crossing pass, future boundless.
explain_en: Go all out. Success.

poem: 人在天涯外，久乏信音来，家人频望眼，草木畅胸怀。
explain: 所念之人，远在他乡，久无讯息，对其怀念殷切。
poem_en: Person outside world, long lack of news. Family looks often, grass and trees smooth heart.
explain_en: Miss distant person.

poem: 这颗树下，一穴生成，若迁此土，福禄骈臻。
explain: 寓意有二: 凡命运亨通者，即或居於枯树古井旁，福泽依增 勿营华屋。
poem_en: Under this tree, a hole formed. If move this earth, fortune and salary gather.
explain_en: Good fortune increases even in bad place.

poem: 躬耕陇亩，形神似劳，无拘无系，其乐陶陶。
explain: 过不求人之生活，身体虽劳，精神却愉快。
poem_en: Plowing in fields, shape and spirit seem tired. No restraint, joy is great.
explain_en: Self-reliant. Tired but happy.

poem: 祸来见鬼，鬼病淹缠，金羊得路，身脱灾殃。
explain: 大祸临头，心被鬼怪的病淹没而纠缠不放，除非有「金、羊」有关事物来救。
poem_en: Disaster comes see ghost, ghost sickness entangles. Gold sheep finds way, body escapes disaster.
explain_en: Disaster. 'Gold/Sheep' saves.

poem: 急起行，急起行，前途去，结同盟，只手擎天柱，史册好标名。
explain: 得此签者可能於仓猝间受命，代表所属协调重大事务，并获圆满成功。
poem_en: Hurry up, hurry up, future go, form alliance. One hand holds sky pillar, name in history.
explain_en: Sudden mission. Alliance. Success.

poem: 深山据猛虎，虎啸出山窝，扬威抖擞，何怕人多。
explain: 雄壮威严，果敢勇往始可折服众人。
poem_en: Deep mountain has fierce tiger, tiger roars out of den. Spread might, why fear many people.
explain_en: Majestic and brave. Conquer crowd.

poem: 三天门，四地户，布阵成，明聚路，军马齐奔，鸣鼓进步。
explain: 吾人行事，宜先制定良策，方可致胜可能。
poem_en: Three heavenly gates, four earthly doors. Formation set, bright road gathered. Army runs together, drum sound progress.
explain_en: Plan first then win.

poem: 山山山，山上建茅 ，不比人间栋宇，却如天上云昙。
explain: 知足常乐。
poem_en: Mountain, mountain, mountain. Build hut on mountain. Not like human building, but like clouds in sky.
explain_en: Contentment.

poem: 来去原无定处，时来时去安身，跋涉无虑，荣辱不计。
explain: 得此签者一生劳碌，谋生之处屡易，好在住宿有着落，奔波途中亦安全。
poem_en: Come and go no fixed place, settle when time comes. Trek without worry, honor and disgrace not counted.
explain_en: Life of wandering. Safe journey.

poem: 有子长，成水局，时遇火反发福，不必过忧煎，人心苦不足。
explain: 世事难以尽如人意，不是太过就是不及，为此伤神忧虑，毫无意义。
poem_en: Have son grow, become water bureau. Time meets fire reverses fortune. No need to worry, human heart bitter insufficient.
explain_en: Life not perfect. Don't worry.

poem: 黑夜里，勿前往，一有值，要着慌，牢牢记，须结党。
explain: 陌生环境未了解前，勿冒然前往，如果必须前往，应结伴而行。
poem_en: In dark night, do not go forward. If encounter, panic. Remember firmly, must form party.
explain_en: Don't go to strange places alone. Group up.

poem: 蛰龙已出世，头角首生成，云兴雨泽，得济苍生。
explain: 大吉大利，所问之事，困局即将突破，从此可入坦途。
poem_en: Hibernating dragon out of world, head and horn generated. Clouds rise rain favors, save the people.
explain_en: Great luck. Break deadlock. Smooth path.

poem: 火势薰天，天边尽赤，遇际水源，庶乎成格。
explain: 一旦发生意外灾祸，事发就不可收拾，应有克制对策，庶几解除困难。
poem_en: Fire smoke touches sky, sky edge all red. Meet water source, almost achieve pattern.
explain_en: Disaster uncontrollable. Need countermeasure.

poem: 向南有大道，乘马入杭城，不知吴人唱，更有一知音。
explain: 含下列寓意：工作地点以南方为宜，寻访可能得遇，交游虽不广，可获知己。
poem_en: Great road to South, ride horse to Hangzhou. Don't know Wu song, but have a soulmate.
explain_en: South is good. Find soulmate.

poem: 有田一亩，尽可耕耘，无穷收获，都在西成。
explain: 家有恒产，虽说不多，若能认真经营终必有成。得此签者似不易离家另谋他业。
poem_en: Have one acre of field, cultivate it fully. Endless harvest, all in autumn success.
explain_en: Manage what you have. Don't leave.

poem: 勿嫌儿无唇，疾足追不及，纳入猿穴中，走狗何处觅。
explain: 此签寓意难明，或指形貌才智虽有缺陷，但天生万物，必有所长。
poem_en: Don't dislike son no lips, fast feet cannot catch. Put in ape hole, where to find running dog.
explain_en: Hard to understand. Everyone has pros/cons.

poem: 六牛耕地，垦开无疆，收成结实，盈禀盈仓。
explain: 一分耕耘，一分收获，天下无侥幸而成之事。
poem_en: Six cows plow land, open up boundless. Harvest fruit, full granary.
explain_en: No pain no gain.

poem: 大奋冲天志，勿苦恋家乡，七八君行早，扬武在沙场。
explain: 成大事者应志在四方，勿囿於一角，把握时机及早行动(七八或与时日机运有关)。
poem_en: Great ambition to sky, do not linger home. Seven eight leave early, show might in battlefield.
explain_en: Ambition in four directions. Seize time (7/8).

poem: 葵花向日，忠赤倾心，大开广厦，乐享太平。
explain: 得此签者深受部属爱戴，都能为其赤诚工作，使其事业鸿图大展。
poem_en: Sunflower faces sun, loyal heart. Open wide mansion, enjoy peace.
explain_en: Loved by subordinates. Career expands.

poem: 人不识仙，那有真诀，一入玄门，津津有益。
explain: 进行一事，必先穷理探源，把握其中要领，方能得心应手。
poem_en: People don't know immortal, no true formula. Once enter mystery gate, interesting and beneficial.
explain_en: Explore principle. Success.

poem: 勿谓说话太沈，泥了就不成真，悟出千般奥妙，方识仙道最神。
explain: 所问之事，面貌并不清朗，须用心去探求其内蕴。
poem_en: Don't say words too deep, mud won't become true. Realize thousand mysteries, know immortal way most divine.
explain_en: Look for inner meaning.

poem: 功名虽多实际，何如修炼成真，真身不朽，万载长春。
explain: 与其汲汲於追求功名，不如修身养性。
poem_en: Fame although practical, how about cultivating truth. True body immortal, eternal spring.
explain_en: Cultivate self better than fame.

poem: 走走走，遇一狗，急思寻，可长久。
explain: 处理事情上不宜忽略小节，要特别注意突生之状况，并推想其缘由方可无事。
poem_en: Walk, walk, walk, meet a dog. Urgent search, can last long.
explain_en: Don't ignore details. Watch out for sudden events.

poem: 不知真消息，消息蓦地来，月圆月缺夜，不许把门开。
explain: 来得仓促之消息，不可轻信，变化 忽或反覆无常事情，少管为妙。
poem_en: Unknown true news, news comes suddenly. Moon round moon missing night, do not open door.
explain_en: Don't trust sudden news. Ignore changes.

poem: 火旺处要不疲，水深处要不呆，到头当酌量，毋得惹他灾。
explain: 事情进行到最重要关头应慎思斟酌，方不致带来灾害。
poem_en: Fire prosperous not tired, water deep not dull. Consider at end, don't provoke disaster.
explain_en: Think carefully at critical moment.

poem: 宾雁 湖地成陆，行建功勋早回程，贪恋终非世人福，莫教鸡鹜会相争。
explain: 见好就收。
poem_en: Guest wild goose, lake land becomes land. Build merit return early. Greed not blessing, don't let chickens and ducks fight.
explain_en: Quit while ahead.

poem: 天上风，天边月，月白风清，两两相当。
explain: 时运正佳，故凡求职、求偶、求学、求财等均有吉利。
poem_en: Wind in sky, moon at edge. Moon white wind clear, two equal.
explain_en: Good luck. Equal match.

poem: 叶归根，长立天地，水清源长流河海，人得金丹长生渊涯。
explain: 万物生长、代谢均循一定之自然趋势，人类亦然，能悟其理，自必长寿无灾。
poem_en: Leaf returns to root, stands in heaven and earth. Water clear source long flow river sea. Person gets golden elixir long life.
explain_en: Follow nature. Long life.

poem: 乘马去长安，看花花正发，一日雨来淋，香色尽凋零。
explain: 花无百日娇，无千日好，得意常想失意时，诸般顺心时，应防突来失意或灾殃。
poem_en: Ride horse to Chang'an, see flowers blooming. One day rain comes, fragrance and color fade.
explain_en: Good times don't last. Prepare for rainy day.

poem: 木长春天根干老，子实三秋枝叶凋，不凋不谢，不见根牢。
explain: 先经挫折磨练，然後其生命力必更坚强。
poem_en: Wood grows spring sky root trunk old, fruit three autumns branch leaves withered. Not withered not faded, root not seen firm.
explain_en: Stronger after setbacks.

poem: 叫道叫道，天将明了，何不伸首舒眉，反做蓬蒿到老。
explain: 早起三光，晏起三荒，应及时努力，遇事不可因循不振。
poem_en: Call path call path, sky will be bright. Why not stretch head and eyebrows, instead be weeds till old.
explain_en: Work hard timely. Don't procrastinate.

poem: 药饵真，服了宁，三剂後，足分明，神中神，清中清，固得紧，可长生。
explain: 任何事物，真即真假即假，一经多方考验，底细便明。
poem_en: Medicine is true, take it peace. After three doses, clear enough. God in god, clear in clear. Hold tight, can live long.
explain_en: Truth stands test.

poem: 三天曾结社，四海尽知名，长骑骏马，直入天庭。
explain: 大吉大利，凡事左右逢源，得心应手。
poem_en: Three days formed society, four seas know name. Ride fast horse, straight into heaven.
explain_en: Great luck. Famous.

poem: 闲来夫子处，偶然遇一人，童颜鹤发，笑里生春。
explain: 命中有吉人相助。
poem_en: Idle at master's place, accidentally meet a person. Child face white hair, laughter generates spring.
explain_en: Noble help.

poem: 闲云野鹤望东行，惟有乡人便是知音，经营布置两三春，联街灯火後，锦帆前程。
explain: 悠闲自在态度追求理想者，际遇最佳，经过二三年之经营，即可有成。
poem_en: Idle cloud wild crane look east, only villager is soulmate. Manage layout two three springs, lights connected, bright future.
explain_en: Success after 2-3 years of management.

poem: 汉水无情，蜀水澄清，黄河滚滚，四处烟尘。
explain: 浊者自浊，清者自清，吾人须洁身自好，以处混乱之险恶世道。
poem_en: Han water ruthless, Shu water clear. Yellow river rolling, smoke and dust everywhere.
explain_en: Stay clean in chaotic world.

poem: 潜龙已受困，尚不见云兴，伫看云四合，飞去到天庭。
explain: 求签者暂遇挫折，目前尚在守时待运阶段，待时机成熟。
poem_en: Hidden dragon trapped, not see clouds rise. Wait for clouds gather, fly to heaven.
explain_en: Wait for time.

poem: 此处滋味浓，浓艳不耐久，何如谈笑生风，倒好东奔西走。
explain: 好花不常开，一旦处於绝佳之境，宜淡然处之，并另谋良图。
poem_en: Taste strong here, strong beauty not durable. How about talking and laughing, better run east and west.
explain_en: Good situation not lasting. Plan elsewhere.

poem: 这里有小人，切莫稍留停，忙打点，好起行，日月如逝勿久存。
explain: 所问诸事可能受到小人干扰破坏，与其争论无益，避之则吉。
poem_en: There is villain here, do not stay. Busy pack, good to go. Days and months pass don't keep long.
explain_en: Avoid villain. Leave.

poem: 龙生头角，将沛甘霖，六七八早，好济苍生。
explain: 感应签，求职谋事创业等，遇龙年生者可得其助，迁居进宅等，逢 678 之日期较顺。
poem_en: Dragon grows head horn, rain falls. Six seven eight early, good to save people.
explain_en: Dragon year help. Dates 6/7/8 good.

poem: 太白现西南，龙蛇相竞逐，龙自飞上天，蛇却被刑戮。
explain: 此签示人：善恶终有报。
poem_en: Venus appears Southwest, Dragon Snake compete. Dragon flies to sky, Snake killed.
explain_en: Good and evil have rewards.

poem: 曾把树栽，也要待春来，东风袅袅，开遍花街。
explain: 寓意有二：一分耕耘，一分收获，已为某事劳心尽力，但须待时机及人助方有成。
poem_en: Planted tree, wait for spring. East wind blows, flowers open on street.
explain_en: Wait for time and help.

poem: 四十馀年苦已深，而今汝乐度光阴，莫筹论，恩爱尚多欢喜事，惜甚青春，不减青春。
explain: 此签劝人要能知足，并把握光阴享受人生。
poem_en: Forty years bitter deep, now you enjoy time. Don't discuss, love and joy many. Cherish youth.
explain_en: Be content. Enjoy life.

poem: 三冬足，文艺精，到头处，亦成冰，急急回首，勿误前程。
explain: 所问诸事做法上恐有问题，应即改弦更张另作安排。
poem_en: Three winters enough, arts refined. At the end, becomes ice. Hurry turn back, don't mistake future.
explain_en: Wrong method. Change course.

poem: 奇怪奇怪，前番来了，今番又来，谨慎提防，勿被弄坏。
explain: 所问之事情况怪异，应提防生变，以免坏了大事。
poem_en: Strange, strange. Came before, come again now. Be cautious, don't be ruined.
explain_en: Strange situation. Beware.

poem: 耕牛伏 ，辟土开疆，坐看收获，黍稷稻梁。
explain: 得此签者有以逸待劳，坐享其成之机运。
poem_en: Plowing cow lying, open territory. Sit and watch harvest, millet and rice.
explain_en: Gain without pain.

poem: 腰下佩青萍，步入金銮殿，覆护三山，千锤百链。
explain: 得此签者功勋卓着，必为行业中顶尖人物，所问诸事无不卓然有成。
poem_en: Waist wears sword, step into golden hall. Protect three mountains, tempered hundred times.
explain_en: Outstanding success. Top of industry.

poem: 雏鸟飞高，出谷迁乔，龙神牙爪，变化海岛。
explain: 此签以雏鸟喻人学艺未精不知天高地厚，初入社会难免饱受波涛翻滚之苦。
poem_en: Young bird flies high, out of valley to tall tree. Dragon god teeth claw, change island.
explain_en: Inexperienced person suffers in society.

poem: 吉吉吉，寻常一样窗前月，凶凶凶，有了梅花便不同，含笑向东风，人情不比旧时浓。
explain: 得此签者恐有不吉事情临头，并因而尝到人情淡薄之滋味。
poem_en: Lucky, lucky, lucky, ordinary like moon before window. Ominous, ominous, ominous, with plum blossom different. Smile to east wind, human feeling not like old times.
explain_en: Bad luck coming. Cold human feelings.

poem: 大火炎炎，宜水相济，宝鼎丹成，掀天揭地。
explain: 不经意引发之灾难总有克制之法，刻意策划之事端，往往一发不可收拾。
poem_en: Fire very hot, water suitable to help. Precious ding elixir formed, lift sky reveal earth.
explain_en: Disaster has cure. Intentional trouble hard to fix.

poem: 铁索一条，未把孤舟系，金刀一下，早把头落地。
explain: 所问之事宜以快刀斩乱麻方式处理，以杜後患。
poem_en: Iron chain one strip, not tied lone boat. Gold knife once, head falls early.
explain_en: Cut the knot quickly.

poem: 十二时中，紧急炼着，一刻少延，无处下脚。
explain: 做任何事，均要抱着积极态度不懈不怠全力以赴，若稍有停顿，将难以收拾。
poem_en: In twelve hours, urgently refine. One moment delay, no place to put foot.
explain_en: Go all out. No delay.

poem: 风起西南，红日当天，奇门妙诀，一掌能着。
explain: 当时机成熟，谜题即可轻易揭开，所有疑难均会得到答案。
poem_en: Wind rises Southwest, red sun in sky. Mysterious formula, one palm can hold.
explain_en: Mystery solved when time comes.

poem: 万籁无声际，一月正当空，忽被云遮掩，皓魄反朦胧。
explain: 谨慎维护形象，以突破谣言扭曲，得此签者有招人忌怨、暗算之危。
poem_en: Silence everywhere, moon in sky. Suddenly covered by clouds, brightness becomes hazy.
explain_en: Maintain image. Beware of slander/plot.

poem: 一个知音，却在天边等，切勿因循，静夜当思省。
explain: 得签者为人处事有「曲过高和太寡」之情形，宜检讨修正。
poem_en: A soulmate, waiting at horizon. Do not delay, reflect in quiet night.
explain_en: Too highbrow. Adjust self.

poem: 众犬相聚，砺齿咬牙，摇头摆尾，只顾看家。
explain: 此签示人勿为小人群聚时之假象欺骗。
poem_en: Dogs gather, grind teeth. Shake head wag tail, just looking after house.
explain_en: Don't be deceived by villains gathering.

poem: 妻前夫後一同行，好比先机兆已明，君若有情须切记，十年恩义莫忘心。
explain: 有的夫妻，妻强夫弱，得此签者有娶这种妻室之可能，婚後应重视恩义。
poem_en: Wife front husband back walk together, omen clear. If you have affection remember, ten years grace don't forget.
explain_en: Wife stronger than husband. Cherish grace.

poem: 鼠伏穴，本自宁，一露首，猫即跟，扬威伸爪，鼠丧残生。
explain: 凡事一动不如一静，坚守本份相安无事，或寓有应严守机密勿使泄露意思。
poem_en: Rat hides in hole, naturally peaceful. Once head shown, cat follows. Spread might extend claw, rat loses life.
explain_en: Stay quiet. Keep secret.

poem: 书中有女颜如玉，书中自有黄金屋，读尽五车书，志愿自能足，何必焦劳心中忙碌。
explain: 得此签者应切记斯言，不再忧心忡忡，终年劳碌而不读书。
poem_en: Book has woman face like jade, book has golden house. Read five carts of books, ambition satisfied. Why worry and busy.
explain_en: Study hard. Don't worry.

poem: 豹变成文采，乘龙福自臻，赤身成富贵，事事得振新。
explain: 得此签者将获佳婿，并因而使生命改观，荣华富贵享用不尽。
poem_en: Leopard changes to pattern, ride dragon luck comes. Naked becomes rich, everything renewed.
explain_en: Get good son-in-law. Life changes. Wealth.

poem: 孤阳微兮，群阴溢兮，力既殚兮，将不可耄兮，真谨慎兮，宜可保兮。
explain: 此签寓有「道消魔长」之意，处此情况唯有谨慎或可保全。
poem_en: Lone Yang weak, group Yin overflow. Strength exhausted, cannot be old. True caution, can be preserved.
explain_en: Evil grows. Caution preserves.

poem: 晓雨初晴映碧溪，重重春色上柴扉，黄金不尽家殷富，何必区区羡锦衣？
explain: 此签示人:家道富裕，宜安於现状，不必另起为官或经商之念。
poem_en: Morning rain clears reflects green creek, heavy spring colors on door. Gold endless family rich, why envy brocade clothes?
explain_en: Rich family. Be content.

poem: 世道多荆棘，人情每用嗟，利名如有路，勤苦逐生涯。
explain: 名利与己与缘，不必在凶险世途上与人争夺，安份守己勤苦渡日最宜。
poem_en: World has many thorns, human feelings sigh. Profit and fame if have road, diligent pursuit of career.
explain_en: Don't fight. Be diligent and content.

poem: 山穷路转迷，水急舟难渡，万事莫强为，出处遭研妒。
explain: 跋山涉水出门远行，均属不利，若违拗命运一意孤行，往往会遇怨怼非议事。
poem_en: Mountain ends road turns lost, water fast boat hard to cross. Don't force everything, encounter jealousy.
explain_en: Travel unfavorable. Forcing brings trouble.

poem: 时边多艰，战战兢兢，戒谨恐惧，如履薄冰，须识前程危与险，一笼风里一枝灯。
explain: 时运不佳，未来日子风险更多，得此签者，须多加谨慎提防为宜。
poem_en: Time has many hardships, trembling. Cautious and fearful, walking on thin ice. Must know future danger, one lantern in wind.
explain_en: Bad luck. Danger ahead. Be cautious.

poem: 一朵花枝艳更芳，清香馥郁透兰房，时风吹送终成笑，好句筵前进几觞。
explain: 得此签者如为女性，必美且慧，远近赞美，如为男性则以品德高贵而受颂扬。
poem_en: One flower branch beautiful and fragrant, fragrance penetrates room. Season wind blows finally smile, good sentences before feast.
explain_en: Woman beautiful/wise. Man noble.

poem: 自从持守定，功在众人先，别有非常喜，随龙到九天。
explain: 一人做任何事，具有恒心、毅力，则其成功机会较大。
