poem_en: Since holding firmly, merit before others. Special joy, follow dragon to heaven.
explain_en: Perseverance leads to success.

poem: 远涉波涛一叶舟，而今始得过滩头，年来心事才成就，屈指从前多可忧。
explain: 此签甚佳，凡事亨通，如寻物得、谋事成、求偶佳、经商利、建屋吉。
poem_en: Far travel waves one leaf boat, now pass beach head. Years of heart matter achieved, counting past many worries.
explain_en: Great luck. Smooth. Wishes fulfilled.

poem: 受君之禄，久降祯祥，盈而不覆，守之乃昌，毋怠毋骄，永保安康。
explain: 得签者久受重用，生活富裕，如起异心或心生骄怠，则可能失去一切。
poem_en: Receive ruler's salary, long auspiciousness. Full not overturned, keep it prosperity. No laziness no pride, eternal health.
explain_en: Don't be proud or lazy to keep success.

poem: 万事不由人计较，一生尽是命安排，莫疑猜，命里有时总有分，何须碌碌混尘埃，休哉！
explain: 谋事在人，成事在天。对一切事物，莫过於贪婪奢求。
poem_en: Everything not by human calculation, life is arranged by fate. Don't suspect, fate has it eventually. Why busy in dust, rest!
explain_en: Fate decides. Don't be greedy.

poem: 一片忧心未肯休，花逢春雨艳难留，得意归休，失意归休，仙家只此一筹谋。
explain: 所问诸事均不顺遂，因而被重重烦忧困住，妇女得此签者宜防情感生活有变。
poem_en: Piece of worry not willing to stop, flower meets spring rain beauty hard to keep. Proud return, disappointed return, immortal only this one plan.
explain_en: Unsmooth. Worried. Love change.

poem: 两女一夫，上下相祛，阴气乘阳，用是耗虚。
explain: 对女色之困惑，须加以警惕，不可贪恋也，否则将有耗虚之虞。
poem_en: Two women one husband, up and down drive away. Yin energy rides Yang, use is waste.
explain_en: Beware of lust. Waste.

poem: 双燕归南国，来寻王谢家，华堂春尽静，进此托生涯。
explain: 倦游归来，景物全非。
poem_en: Double swallows return to South, seek Wang Xie family. Hall spring quiet, enter here to trust life.
explain_en: Return to changed scene.

poem: 命运蹇兮时违，灾殃及兮身疲，望皇天兮不我顾，嗟我亲兮病斯危。
explain: 不吉，诸事不宜。
poem_en: Fate difficult time against, disaster comes body tired. Look at heaven not care, sigh parents sick dangerous.
explain_en: Inauspicious. Everything unfavorable.

poem: 采药天台路转迷，桃花流水赋佳期，春风啼鸟多情思，寄语刘郎且莫归。
explain: 在他乡工作时意外得遇知音，事事顺遂，暂且不宜返乡。
poem_en: Picking herbs Tiantai road lost, peach blossom flowing water beautiful time. Spring wind bird calls sentimental, tell Liu Lang not to return.
explain_en: Meet soulmate in foreign land. Don't return yet.

poem: 出温入寒，被薄衣单，去我慈航，难解横愆。
explain: 因时运不济及自己过错，使得处境至为孤寂无助，应借助信仰力量以求自救。
poem_en: Out of warm into cold, quilt thin clothes single. Leave my compassion boat, hard to solve crime.
explain_en: Bad luck and own fault. Seek faith.

poem: 三升三石放在一斗，满而溢，子自得。
explain: 示人不可削足适屦，亦寓有「满招损」之意。
poem_en: Three sheng three dan put in one dou, full and overflow, you get it.
explain_en: Don't force fit. Fullness invites loss.

poem: 谁说故乡无滋味，飘零湖海在天涯，任咨嗟，中秋月隐春雨淋花，多少征人长忆家。
explain: 得此签者，恐终年在外奔波，受尽寂寥之苦，常起思乡之念。
poem_en: Who says hometown has no taste, drifting lakes and seas at horizon. Let sigh, Mid-Autumn moon hidden spring rain wets flower, many travelers miss home.
explain_en: Wandering outside. Lonely. Miss home.

poem: 云散月当空，牛前马後逢，张弓方抵御，一箭定全功。
explain: 鼠年及羊年会有一举成功机会。
poem_en: Clouds scatter moon in sky, meet before cow after horse. Draw bow to resist, one arrow settles success.
explain_en: Rat/Goat year success.

poem: 马进徐行似有程，月沈西海日东升，运来何必劳心力，风送江湖万里清。
explain: 目前机运欠佳，事情进行缓慢，日夜*劳，来日运转，情况即可完全改观。
poem_en: Horse advances slow seems to have journey, moon sinks west sea sun rises east. Luck comes why labor, wind sends river lake ten thousand miles clear.
explain_en: Luck turning good. Situation changes.

poem: 云横山际水茫茫，千里长途望故乡，蹇厄事来君莫恨，倚门惆怅立斜阳。
explain: 困厄之事临身，一时难以解除，惆怅难免，怨恨则不必。
poem_en: Clouds across mountain water vast, thousand miles looking at hometown. Disaster comes don't hate, leaning on door sad in setting sun.
explain_en: Hardship. Sadness.

poem: 风波今已息，舟楫遇安流，自此功名遂，何须叹白头。
explain: 一切纷争已息，今後行程应平稳无险，刻下经营多顺利，虽慢了些又何妨？
poem_en: Wind and waves now calmed, boat meets safe flow. From now fame achieved, why sigh white hair.
explain_en: Trouble over. Smooth journey. Success.

poem: 巴到平安地，江山万里程，绿杨芳草处，风快马蹄轻。
explain: 历尽千辛万苦，如今终入佳境。
poem_en: Arrive at safe place, landscape ten thousand miles. Green willow fragrant grass, wind fast horse hoof light.
explain_en: Hardship over. Enter good state.

poem: 雕鹗当秋势转雄，乘风分翼到蟾宫，荣华若问将来事，先後名声达九重。
explain: 时来运转，气势甚雄，做任何事均能顺利无比。
poem_en: Eagle in autumn momentum turns strong, ride wind spread wings to moon palace. Glory if ask future, fame reaches nine heavens.
explain_en: Luck turns. Powerful momentum. Success.

poem: 鼠为患终宵不得宁，猫儿一叫几夜太平，人岂识如兽，其理甚分明。
explain: 小人得志，嚣张狂妄，但为时不长。
poem_en: Rat causes trouble all night not peaceful, cat calls a few nights peace. People do not know like beast, reason very clear.
explain_en: Villain rampant but short-lived.

poem: 两人在旁，太阳在上，照汝一寸心，仙机曾否明。
explain: 举头三尺有神明，与人相处莫欺心，是非到头自分明。
poem_en: Two people at side, sun above. Shine on your inch heart, immortal machine ever clear.
explain_en: Gods watching. Don't cheat. Truth reveals.

poem: 君子道消，小人道长，阴气郁郁，阳气不扬，如何如何，良贾深藏。
explain: 若大丈夫怀才不遇，则深藏不露乃为上策。
poem_en: Gentleman way fades, villain way grows. Yin energy gloomy, Yang energy not raised. How how, good merchant hides deep.
explain_en: Hide talent. Don't show off.

poem: 去到长安，东北转角，逢着天门，便有下落。
explain: 未明，视所问事而定。
poem_en: Go to Chang'an, Northeast corner. Meet Heavenly Gate, then have whereabouts.
explain_en: Unknown. Depends on question.

poem: 徐步入天台，为听好消息，采药有仙童，洞府列春色。
explain: 机运不能坐等，要亲自向可能之处探寻，寻必有所得。
poem_en: Slowly enter Tiantai, listen to good news. Picking herbs has fairy boy, cave lists spring colors.
explain_en: Actively search. Will find.

poem: 思量一夜，不如打干一番，若还错，烦恼及肺肝。
explain: 此签寓意至明。
poem_en: Thinking all night, better do it. If wrong, worry lungs and liver.
explain_en: Action better than thinking.

poem: 心细胆粗，可胜上将之任，勇往前行成败何必在心，胸中把持得定，敌人自能受困。
explain: 此签寓意至明。
poem_en: Heart fine daring coarse, can win general's duty. Brave forward success failure not in mind, chest hold steady, enemy naturally trapped.
explain_en: Brave and steady wins.

poem: 天念苦修人，终不落红尘，清心能见道，扰扰丧真灵。
explain: 对某件事能专心致志去做，收获必不同凡响。
poem_en: Heaven pities ascetic, finally not fall into red dust. Clear heart can see Dao, disturbing loses true spirit.
explain_en: Focus brings success.

poem: 捕兕於渊，求鱼於山，从朝至暮，功负力捐，改弦易辙，庶可图全。
explain: 走错方向，用错方法，难望有成，应改弦更张，另设他法，或有成就一天。
poem_en: Catch rhino in abyss, seek fish in mountain. From morning to evening, merit negative strength donated. Change string change track, maybe can keep whole.
explain_en: Wrong direction. Change method.

poem: 手持一木鱼，沿街去化缘，不见徐公来，却遇一鸟去。
explain: 所问之事恐徒劳无功。
poem_en: Hand holding a wooden fish, beg along street. Not see Xu Gong come, but meet a bird go.
explain_en: Vain effort.

poem: 水火既济，阴阳相契，育物新民，参天赞地。
explain: 所有冲突已化解，障碍亦撤除，环境无比和谐，适宜做任何事。
poem_en: Water fire completed, Yin Yang match. Nurture things new people, participate heaven praise earth.
explain_en: Conflict resolved. Harmony. Suitable for all.

poem: 骑玉兔，到广寒，遇嫦娥，将桂攀，满身馥郁，两袖馨香。
explain: 得此签者机缘奇佳，得遇贵人，因而飞黄腾达事事遂心，如问姻缘，可得佳人。
poem_en: Ride jade rabbit, to Guanghan. Meet Chang'e, climb cassia. Full body fragrant, two sleeves scent.
explain_en: Great luck. Noble help. Rise high. Marriage good.

poem: 一个神道，随尔去行，逢人说法，到处显灵。
explain: 得此签者手法高明，待人处事八面玲珑，如有神道随行。
poem_en: A god, follow you. Preach to people, show spirit everywhere.
explain_en: Capable. Smooth social skills. God-like.

poem: 炉中火，沙里金，功力到，丹鼎成。
explain: 功夫到了，任何事均可以做成。
poem_en: Fire in furnace, gold in sand. Effort arrived, elixir formed.
explain_en: Effort leads to success.

poem: 此去万里程，却遇见知音，同心共济，大立勋名。
explain: 得此签者将有远行，并在当地遇知音，成家立业，赢得声名。
poem_en: This trip ten thousand miles, but meet soulmate. Same heart help, establish great name.
explain_en: Far travel. Meet soulmate. Success.

poem: 寻芳春日，适见花开，朵朵堪摘，枝枝可栽。
explain: 做任何事要能适当其时，才会处处逢源，事事顺心。
poem_en: Seeking fragrance spring day, just see flowers bloom. Every flower can be picked, every branch can be planted.
explain_en: Right time. Success everywhere.

poem: 龙一吟，云便兴，冲霄直上，快睹太平，为文为武，君君臣臣。
explain: 所问之事，已出现祥瑞之兆，很快就有和谐局面出现。
poem_en: Dragon chants, clouds rise. Rush to sky, see peace. Literary and martial, ruler and minister.
explain_en: Auspicious sign. Harmony.

poem: 虎出金榜，有勇亦何济，怎似山翁，非富犹有趣。
explain: 若干情况出乎常情之外，不能以常理处之，此时须求助於专门人才。
poem_en: Tiger on gold list, bravery what use. How like mountain old man, not rich still interesting.
explain_en: Abnormal situation. Seek expert help.

poem: 过羊肠，入康庄，五陵裘马，当思故乡。
explain: 历尽辛苦，而步入舒适称意之环境，须饮水思源不可忘本。
poem_en: Pass sheep intestine, enter thoroughfare. Five tombs fur coat horse, think of hometown.
explain_en: Hardship to comfort. Don't forget roots.

poem: 火遭水克，火灭其光，水势滔滔，源远流长。
explain: 处理紧急情况，不能*切，须防後患。
poem_en: Fire conquered by water, fire extinguishes light. Water potential surging, source far flow long.
explain_en: Emergency needs caution. Beware of future.

poem: 东阁筵开，佳客自来，高歌唱和，展挹舒怀。
explain: 得签人已颇有名望，且乐於交际应酬，往来多为高雅之士。
poem_en: East pavilion feast open, good guests come. Singing together, express feelings.
explain_en: Famous. Social. High class.

poem: 世界似清宁，不知辞已休，打叠要小心，须防遭火 。
explain: 天下本无事，庸人自扰之，或谓「苦恼皆因强出头」。
poem_en: World seems clear peaceful, unknown resignation stopped. Pack carefully, beware of fire.
explain_en: Nothing wrong but self-trouble. Or beware fire.

poem: 跳龙门，须激浪，雷电轰轰，踊跃万丈。
explain: 要达崇高目标，须有超人本事，并能借机乘势。
poem_en: Jump dragon gate, must excite waves. Thunder and lightning boom, jump ten thousand feet.
explain_en: High goal needs super ability and chance.

poem: 山上有古松，亭亭冲汉斗，干老枝更长，天地生荣久。
explain: 顺其自然，把握有利机运去求发展，才会有指望。
poem_en: Mountain has ancient pine, standing tall to sky. Trunk old branch longer, heaven and earth life long.
explain_en: Follow nature. Seize chance.

poem: 诽谤言，勿计论，到头来，数已定，碌碌浮生，不如安分。
explain: 对於挑拨离间之闲言杂语，不去理会，一切自有天数，冥冥之中报应不爽。
poem_en: Slander words, don't argue. In the end, number fixed. Busy life, better be content.
explain_en: Ignore slander. Fate fixed. Be content.

poem: 一头猪，可祭天地，虽丧身，亦算好处。
explain: 天生万物必有用，寓意人万勿连猪狗都不如。
poem_en: A pig, can sacrifice to heaven and earth. Although lose life, considered benefit.
explain_en: Useful sacrifice.

poem: 与其日营营，何如夜忖忖，日里多劳形，夜间却安稳。
explain: 此签寓意至明。
poem_en: Rather than busy day, better think night. Labor body day, quiet night.
explain_en: Work hard day, rest night. Clear meaning.

poem: 东风来，花自开，大家喝采，畅饮三杯。
explain: 万事俱备，只欠东风，如今东风来了，自是令人开怀之事。
poem_en: East wind comes, flowers open. Everyone cheers, drink three cups.
explain_en: Ready. Happy event.

poem: 疏食饮水，乐在其中，膏梁美味，反使心朦。
explain: 知足常乐。
poem_en: Coarse food drink water, joy in it. Rich food, makes heart dim.
explain_en: Contentment.

poem: 黄牛辟土，大力开疆，西成时候，谷米盈仓。
explain: 一分耕耘，一分收获。
poem_en: Yellow ox opens earth, great effort opens territory. West success time, grain fills granary.
explain_en: No pain no gain.

poem: 蛇可化龙，头角将出，平地一声雷，方显龙蛇力。
explain: 得此签者在平凡中力求不凡，即将有所成就。
poem_en: Snake can turn to dragon, head horn coming out. Thunder on flat ground, show dragon snake power.
explain_en: Ordinary to extraordinary. Success.

poem: 九华山顶，紫气腾腾，异尽一舟，取去前行。
explain: 得签者可望取得通达之机缘，从此一帆风顺。
poem_en: Jiuhua mountain top, purple energy rising. Different boat, take to go forward.
explain_en: Opportunity to succeed. Smooth.

poem: 人非孔颜鲜能无过，过而能改仍复无过，开花不足凭，结果方为准，放开怀抱意欣欣。
explain: 有错要知悔改，做事务必落实，心胸宽大，人生才有意义。
poem_en: People are not sages, few can be without fault. Fault changed is no fault. Flowers not enough proof, fruit is standard. Open embrace happy.
explain_en: Admit and correct mistakes. Result matters. Be open.
